clean_body: You are invited join Laurel and Team Imer in Teller and Custer Counties. | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Supporter, We would love to have you join Laurel and Team Imer at the following events this week and next! First up, Join Laurel in Teller County at Tweeds Fine Furnishings in Woodland Park, CO. This event is hosted by Ms. Biba Herman and Mr. Tanner Coy. Join us for some light refreshments, meet Laurel and her team and find out how to get involved in the CD7 race. | == | | | == | Next, Join Laurel and Team Imer in Custer County, CO for another meet and greet hosted by Charlotte Bouts! | == | | | == | Laurel wants to come to your area next! Sign up to host a meet and greet of your own for Laurel by filling out the form below. | == | | | == | Laurel and Team Imer are looking forward to seeing you in Teller County on Thursday night the 26th for the debate and on Friday the 27th for the Meet and Greet at Tweeds. The Laurel Imer for Congress Events Team encourages you to sign up to Host a Meet and Greet with Laurel as we lead up to ballots dropping. These types of events open Laurel up to a circle of voters that she might not normally be able to reach and we encourage you to host an event soon! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stop the anti-life movement
body:
We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9kksacadb8vm5gg043chs8i0tcmgdne7dpki6n0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpj61pr6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkmlhr4slkseobcc31mhhr8t35cdgn2tb0e6pn8pjgm4r32phimpqj2tdle6pbfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdimdj30slgcpon5cr4cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd6pcvdi3f4u8pjgg55bbc1iaq3fjvda5togagv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpj61pr6c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7npj10lcbcq5fll8alq4ulsksqcihqfgufqaodg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpj61pr6c3h2bs) I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcvpsi7hrl2366jq4vtml9vi02k0ni361qc2rnq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpj61pr6c3h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Calling on my inner circle:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, I’ve been working tirelessly to defend your rights in Congress, but I wanted to step back for a minute and powwow with my most dependable conservatives.

There are _so many issues_ facing America today, from the incompetent Biden Administration to the threat of the Chinese Communist Party.

If we’re going to get _anything_ done, we have to prioritize, which is why I’m calling on YOU, Peter.

I put together a survey to find out which issue is your TOP PRIORITY right now, and your input will help us develop our plan to save America from the radical Left.

[**Take our “Top Issue Survey” now and let me know what YOU think is the most important issue facing America today.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=67ae62c3916b4987b703ea5f82176b5a&_e=3a2rTRdjClYSjlokdxJKk9ecjAMCSy2tRl9pc2rjHGl9UrDsnkkTVLYlPlgHiypCRTY5BgfGNK7XA5GEzOA2qMvx7YSUZN9TVc6yJO8L94pIg5AZgKVjBjpvXbtcBIpeWBnLE4ZEr-UFLSwzwSF2AvmeI3Vc3iK6oJlerX7AImMWBGkbs6Rpx2AuheGaaubpoCQEGlIQ43yOBzIvB8mY2MLIVV2dYSfQG0Iy-W8W_jFk09tdUizg_KEh_EPo-Ok1gPiTIwzZmllrr-OzJ-rv72BzrYS5NrggVDW5dpU88o2HAzbg4CK9D7qMjTIhn9CTsmi7mP5-Iw_uE6CEyx0PIfg7R6QUXXG-DvGs8EiPPHAAGZAc1E8hFJaky_mkck6r3zPwi9cscg4iIWZAYF6kTw%3D%3D)

subject: I’m in shock

Every time I fill up my gas tank, I’m in shock.

Just when you think gas prices can’t go any higher, they do!

Anti-energy policies by Joe Biden are making America dependent again on our foes and harming hardworking American families with unreliable, unproven Green New Deal pipe dreams - but I’m not about to sit by idly while they put shackles on American energy.

I’m running for the United States House in New York’s 18th Congressional District to **BRING BACK President Trump’s energy boom** and stand up for American citizens like **YOU** who are **SICK AND TIRED** of paying too much at the pump.

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Hate has no place in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

May is Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month. It's an opportunity to celebrate America's diversity while recognizing - and working to overcome - our nation's history of anti-AAPI legislation and anti-AAPI discrimination.

The COVID-19 pandemic worsened anti-AAPI violence, but it certainly wasn't the beginning of it. From racist so-called "Alien Land Laws," which prohibited land ownership, to the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II, Washington state has a history of anti-AAPI policies that we need to remedy.

Hate has no home in Washington state or anywhere else in this country. **Now, more than ever, we must make a choice to stand against hatred and discrimination.**

Last year, I was proud to co-sponsor Rep. Grace Meng's resolution to condemn the rise in anti-Asian sentiment. And I proudly co-sponsored the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act to help prevent hate crimes related to COVID-19.

**[It will take all of us to make a difference, so I hope you'll join in this fight. This month and beyond, will you commit to standing in solidarity with the AAPI community? Add your name next to mine. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fANy7bKSYl4L5Gx8QCWmQpjeRM-emMqKfauetejN8QU=/knhFzFrH9OtBslH04Bd5pLg7FavjDZiGHCPoCyaqPnM=?ms=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&source=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fANy7bKSYl4L5Gx8QCWmQpjeRM-emMqKfauetejN8QU=/knhFzFrH9OtBslH04Bd5pLg7FavjDZiGHCPoCyaqPnM=?ms=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&source=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_AAPI_esrv_gq_act_sur_DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Liz Walters
subject: This is our first end-of-month deadline since the primary.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can elect Tim Ryan and Nan Whaley in November
| We are coming up on our first end-of-month deadline since the primary election, Team.

**This November, we will have the opportunity to elect strong leaders like Tim Ryan and Nan Whaley in Ohio, but we need your help to do it.**

With voting rights, reproductive rights, and so much more on the line in 2022, we can't afford to let extreme Republicans like J.D. Vance and Mike DeWine win in November.

Here's the bottom line: Ohioans deserve leaders who will put in the work to fight for them, not exploit them for personal financial gain. That's why we're proud to be fighting alongside Tim and Nan to help them win their respective races.

But with national Republicans spending big against us and doing whatever it takes to get their extremist candidates into office, we can't afford to fall behind on this crucial end-of-month deadline. We only have five months until the election, so we have no time to waste.

**[Before our first end-of-month deadline since the primary, will you chip in $10 or more so we can continue fighting to get Nan Whaley, Tim Ryan, and Ohio Democrats elected this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45662522/346937691/2017921164?refcode=em22_220523_eom1_fnd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_eom1_fnd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViODk1Mi1kYmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0lJ3cTupmnDyjCL-ryS8DL9-E8W6QOpo3qnynSgR0E=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45662530/346937696/2017921164?refcode=em22_220523_eom1_fnd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_eom1_fnd_gq_act___LW_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWViODk1Mi1kYmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0lJ3cTupmnDyjCL-ryS8DL9-E8W6QOpo3qnynSgR0E=)

Here's the bottom line: Ohioans deserve leaders who will put in the work to fight for them, not exploit them for personal financial gain. That's why we're proud to be fighting alongside Tim and Nan to help them win their respective races. But with national Republicans spending big against us and doing whatever it takes to get their extremist candidates into office, we can't afford to fall behind on this crucial end-of-month deadline. We only have five months until the election, so we have no time to waste. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Liz Liz Walters Chair Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open U.S. Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Ohio Democratic Party 340 E Fulton St Columbus, OH 43215 United States | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Hi Peter,
I’m deeply honored to be featured on the cover of the latest edition of the Texas Observer , and wanted you to get a first look! You can find the magazine on news stands now.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=05.23_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=05.23_email]

From downtown San Antonio, to Kyle, to East Austin – we've built a movement of working people, for working people. And it’s time for us to organize like hell to make our democracy work for us. - Greg

name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6944%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=v5MUHVrH4QJh2SeHy63CHA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62557%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oY2dKZbdmfSR4Ewp4SayBw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62558%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QNB9NUeqxEUsvkp7hNaddQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HJ1GtRr7K6WfhdfqffY4Gw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6944%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=v5MUHVrH4QJh2SeHy63CHA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6944%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=v5MUHVrH4QJh2SeHy63CHA&sysid=1)

clean_body: Iowans casting ballots: | | | Peter: If Democrat Abby Finkenauer defeats Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa, it will virtually guarantee Democratic Senate control. With early voting underway, here's what you need to know: FIRST, after polling showed Abby LEADING the Democratic primary, Sen. Chuck Grassley launched his first attack ad against Abby. THEN, Abby launched her very first TV ad to fight national Republicans' attacks as Iowans head to the polls. BUT NOW, the Senate GOP campaign arm has more than $44 million in the bank to protect incumbents like Grassley – and we're falling short of the $25,000 we must raise to keep our ad on the air! With Iowans casting their ballots, falling short on the resources we need to spread this brand-new TV ad far and wide is not an option. Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approvals with Iowans, and this is our best shot to make our case to voters and flip this seat blue come November! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | |

name: Constant for Congress
subject: Chris needs to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Constant for Congress
body:
Our congressional Special Election is fast approaching (voting ends June 11!), and we have a real opportunity to send a Democrat to Congress – an opportunity we haven’t had in decades. Chris Constant is ready to fight for ALL Alaskans, from creating jobs and supporting working families to fighting for local control and investing in our communities. | | | **Special Election Priorities Survey**

[Click here to share your thoughts with Chris about the top issues in our fast-approaching Special Election Primary!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45663012/346939672/1873388982?refcode=CC_EM_SV_WL_220523_1_1&contactdata=QuPcSdeWFnRDdjdpZ1IaQpjaxD0XXJdxmpcXhJhJ5mrwT2nY5b1MHC7EOLo6nBgD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzczZjMyMy1kZGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUq_CVrk6F9CcZlxDXrMC1PGbHj6yEm97XOOQx_Bi5o=&emci=6ffe2bd7-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6773f323-ddda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6236720) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45663013/346939673/1873388982?refcode=CC_EM_SV_WL_220523_1_1&contactdata=QuPcSdeWFnRDdjdpZ1IaQpjaxD0XXJdxmpcXhJhJ5mrwT2nY5b1MHC7EOLo6nBgD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzczZjMyMy1kZGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUq_CVrk6F9CcZlxDXrMC1PGbHj6yEm97XOOQx_Bi5o=&emci=6ffe2bd7-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6773f323-ddda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6236720)**

Our congressional Special Election is fast approaching (voting ends June 11!), and we have a real opportunity to send a Democrat to Congress – an opportunity we haven’t had in decades.

We're so proud to have former U.S. Senator Mark Begich's endorsement in this race. Mark knows Chris Constant will fight for ALL Alaskans, from creating jobs and supporting working families to fighting for local control and investing in our communities.

[But with Election Day right around the corner, Chris needs to hear directly from you about what your priorities are in this Special Election. We need 500 respondents to share their thoughts before our survey closes tomorrow at midnight – will you be one of them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45663014/346939674/1873388982?refcode=CC_EM_SV_WL_220523_1_1&contactdata=QuPcSdeWFnRDdjdpZ1IaQpjaxD0XXJdxmpcXhJhJ5mrwT2nY5b1MHC7EOLo6nBgD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzczZjMyMy1kZGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUq_CVrk6F9CcZlxDXrMC1PGbHj6yEm97XOOQx_Bi5o=&emci=6ffe2bd7-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6773f323-ddda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6236720) | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45663015/346939675/1873388982?refcode=CC_EM_SV_WL_220523_1_1&contactdata=QuPcSdeWFnRDdjdpZ1IaQpjaxD0XXJdxmpcXhJhJ5mrwT2nY5b1MHC7EOLo6nBgD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzczZjMyMy1kZGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUq_CVrk6F9CcZlxDXrMC1PGbHj6yEm97XOOQx_Bi5o=&emci=6ffe2bd7-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6773f323-ddda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6236720)**

Chris came to Alaska more than 25 years ago as a commercial fisherman in the Upper Cook Inlet. Since then, he’s built deep relationships with people and organizations throughout Alaska.

He’s committed to always putting the interests of our state first – and that’s why he needs to hear from you today.

**Here’s the link to submit your survey responses:**[https://secure.ngpvan.com/8JIHhyBmz0yY2jxXrH9ljA2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45663016/346939676/1873388982?refcode=CC_EM_SV_WL_220523_1_1&contactdata=QuPcSdeWFnRDdjdpZ1IaQpjaxD0XXJdxmpcXhJhJ5mrwT2nY5b1MHC7EOLo6nBgD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzczZjMyMy1kZGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUq_CVrk6F9CcZlxDXrMC1PGbHj6yEm97XOOQx_Bi5o=&emci=6ffe2bd7-d9da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6773f323-ddda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6236720)

We couldn’t be more grateful for your willingness to support the campaign. We’ve got only a few weeks before the primary and we need all hands on deck!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Burril?=
subject: Thank you for supporting me.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/burrilforcongress/burril-post-campaign-update?e=80f8383115)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Burril For Congress Supporters,

It has been a lot of fun communicating with you over these past six months regarding the Congressional campaign.

Thank you for your prayers, kind notes, financial donations, attendance at meet and greets, putting out signs, talking to friends at church, hanging with the Vinyl Brothers, working the polls and of course, your votes.

Each of you knew this would be an uphill campaign, as I am an amateur in the political ring. The twists and fast paced events that shaped this campaign will make good History Channel footage someday. The national media chose this race to highlight modern day, digital age social media campaigning and the influence of former President Trump that (in their minds) encapsulated the national conflicted tone of the Republican party.
---
| Our piece of the story went largely unnoticed by the local and national media folks. But not by you and many others in this district. Yes, we came in a distant third place in the vote count, but our reputation and name did not get a smidge of tarnish. Exactly the opposite. Even the eventual winner, Senator Chuck Edwards, told me face-to-face that I ran the most respectful campaign in the field. It's too bad that political campaign directors are sold on negative images, and millions of dollars are required to win.

I want you to know that Matthew Burril is completely at peace with the strategy and execution of the Burril for Congress campaign. _Guys, we gave the race our best effort and I have no regrets._

Having you as supporters is still quite humbling. Each of you gave me your reputation and asked me to leverage it in order to become your United States Congressional Representative for the people of these 15 western North Carolina counties. That's a huge gift.

_**Thank you for backing me.**_

I will keep the Burril for Congress [website](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=6d6e0602e8&e=80f8383115) and Facebook [page](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=2c56154d78&e=80f8383115) live for the remainder of the 2022 election cycle, so feel free to check in as I plan to post some comments and will be willing to answer questions you may have about the general election.

All my best,
---
|
---
Matthew Burril
Luke 1:37
Candidate for U.S. Congress
| | | | | | | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=ef14ce3ed0&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=0580bd0d0c&e=80f8383115)
---
| | [](https://burrilforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d856a0cc32aa614db81ad78e&id=67066fd1b9&e=80f8383115)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Burril for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Burril for CongressPO Box 1778Fletcher, NC 28732-1778

Having you as supporters is still quite humbling. Each of you gave me your reputation and asked me to leverage it in order to become your United States Congressional Representative for the people of these 15 western North Carolina counties. That's a huge gift. Thank you for backing me. I will keep the Burril for Congress and Facebook live for the remainder of the 2022 election cycle, so feel free to check in as I plan to post some comments and will be willing to answer questions you may have about the general election. All my best, | Matthew Burril Luke 1:37 Candidate for U.S. Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Burril for Congress, All rights reserved.

Our first big ad is officially on the air!

Our future-focused ad, called “Family”, highlights Joe’s plans to make the future for South Carolina’s kids a better place. McMaster has failed our families by not taking action to improve our economy, support our teachers, and more.

Whether it’s Joe’s son or his nieces and nephews — or your families — right now, he’s concerned about the future of every child in South Carolina and when he’s governor, his top priority is reversing the years of damage to their future.

name: Stop Fox News (via Left Action)
subject: Tucker Carlson and Fox News must be held accountable for inciting violence
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: Demand that Fox News stop promoting 'white replacement theory' >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98d8e5b6-9c85-40c3-828b-9ee925eda43a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0663690b-7565-4dad-9edc-6fdcd9b7f56e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Tucker Carlson has used his Fox News show to relentlessly promote white supremacist beliefs, giving those beliefs an enormous platform and mainstreaming them into "conservative" ideology. Among the far-right conspiracy theories Carlson has promoted is 'replacement theory,' which claims that a shadowy elite cabal is seeking to replace white Americans with immigrants from Africa, the Middle East, and South America. Not only is the mainstreaming of this white supremacist theory disgusting, but it is inspiring violence against communities of color – most recently in Buffalo, NY where 10 people were murdered in a grocery store last week. These extremist conspiracy theories are downright dangerous – and they have been amplified by Fox News and their anchors for years. Carlson alone has mentioned the ‘replacement theory’ in over 400 episodes of his show. We must speak out against this threat. Fox News has the responsibility to stop promoting these dangerous false conspiracy theories to millions of viewers. **[Sign the petition: Demand that Fox News stop promoting 'white replacement theory'>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6da12ef8-0d2d-4b37-a17a-b9c2fc66dc30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2be0837e-c9e4-48d3-9ad5-b0abf9a275d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

This time, she will. And we believe that Marcus Flowers -- a Democrat and Army Veteran -- is the man for the job.** _**Marjorie Taylor Greene is beatable, so we can’t screw this up. There is simply too much on the line.**_ [**We know that the powerful don’t concede without a fight, so we need your help. body:
My primary election is in tomorrow, early votes have already been cast, and time is running out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztlp71lq14hs3mts5f2f6co9duqcv9gmrgejpbng_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uuqe0pj36kq72tpgesoj2tj6ctgeeoblecqncd3hmdhmat9imhprad5hc5ir6ptnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapmcdti65j3appjcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpj62p31c1ie49fg)

| | | Friend, I'm urgently reaching out to you with a humble request.

My primary election is tomorrow, early votes have already been cast, and time is running out.

We're close to pulling off something great here in Georgia, but we're being significantly outspent by our Democrat opponent who has been advertising heavily for months.

_**[If you have anything to spare- anything at all - I'm asking that you step up today to help us close the fundraising gap.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmo27fd2sh2e0asjrajor1hna5tj52b1elgkhjj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpgm8ob0cjh2bs "If you have anything to spare – anything at all – I’m asking that you step up today to help us close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [Contribute Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfndigpk2666pob0r2n0r3p2p923nvivvual1lho_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpgm8ob0cjh2bs "Contribute Now")
---

Republicans only need to pick up one seat to take back the Senate, and our race in Georgia is that seat.

Our primary on Tuesday will set the tone and momentum for the rest of 2022, but the clock is ticking. _**[That's why I'm hoping you'll step up with any amount you're able ASAP, even if it's just three dollars - every penny counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zolr6emrvn6gcsp2inmmaflunjnok7o4mhinpfeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpgm8ob0cjh2bs "That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with any amount you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just three dollars – every penny counts.")**_

_**[Winning the primary election is the first step to defeating Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and flipping the Senate in November.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9fcvtgi51nglrjmqajodn0pmg1vm7cq0l0m5eg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpgm8ob0cjh2bs "Winning the primary election is the first step to defeating Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and flipping the Senate in November.")**_

Friend, I know we can win. We just need your help.

_**[Can we count on you to pitch in right away to help us win?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmo4ktss9v70cn0dpl2ufcma4u7vjklu3i0e4sb0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cpgm8ob0cjh2bs "Can we count on you to pitch in right away to help us win in just 2 days?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

To victory,

Herschel Walker

body:

Hey Derek, I really need to share these photos with you.
John Fetterman and I are running in two of the most important races anywhere in the country. If we succeed in flipping our seats blue, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand the Democratic Senate majority.
**But that’s not all. If John and I win, we’ll be adding some much needed former-mullet representation to the Senate.** Take a look:

Peter,
Have you heard of**Representative Henry Cuellar (TX-28):** the last ANTI-abortion Democrat in the House? Let us tell you a bit more about him...
Rep. Cuellar is the ONLY sitting Democratic House Member to vote against the Women’s Health Protection Act. He’s one of very few Democrats who supported Trump’s reproductive gag rule. In 2018, Cuellar fired a female staffer who was 28 weeks pregnant because she requested maternity leave.
**Cuellar is supported by the same establishment leaders in Congress that endorsed one of our opponents. They may be ok with propping up anti-choice candidates,_but we are not._**
**Enter _Jessica Cisneros_ : Cuellar’s pro-choice challenger.** Jessica is a human rights attorney and daughter of immigrants. She’s dedicated her career to progressive activism and has never once wavered on supporting a woman’s right to choose.

clean_body: Jessica needs our help to defeat her anti-choice opponent, so will you please split a contribution between our campaigns before her election tomorrow? | = | Peter, Did you see my team's email? Jessica Cisneros is running to replace the last anti-abortion Democrat in the House, Rep. Henry Cuellar (TX-28) — and her runoff election is TOMORROW! As bold progressives, Jessica and I both know that we can't waste time electing Democrats who won't fight for reproductive rights. These fights demand action now, and it's going to take progressive champions like Jessica and me to get it done. = | | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Progressive Update (via John King for MD) <info@johnkingforgovernor.com> Date: Thu, May 19, 2022 at 11:54 AM Subject: Jessica Cisneros To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, Have you heard ofRepresentative Henry Cuellar (TX-28): the last ANTI-abortion Democrat in the House? Let us tell you a bit more about him... Rep. Cuellar is the ONLY sitting Democratic House Member to vote against the Women’s Health Protection Act. He’s one of very few Democrats who supported Trump’s reproductive gag rule. In 2018, Cuellar fired a female staffer who was 28 weeks pregnant because she requested maternity leave. Cuellar is supported by the same establishment leaders in Congress that endorsed one of our opponents. They may be ok with propping up anti-choice candidates,but we are not. Enter Jessica Cisneros : Cuellar’s pro-choice challenger. Jessica is a human rights attorney and daughter of immigrants. She’s dedicated her career to progressive activism and has never once wavered on supporting a woman’s right to choose. Now, Jessica is ready to finally replace the only remaining anti-choice Democrat in Congress. But, she needs the support of fellow pro-choice champions like us to win her Texas primary next Tuesday — just five days from now. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, we can't waste time electing Democrats who won't stand up to fight for reproductive rights. Protecting a woman’s right to choose demands action now, and it's going to take progressive champions like Jessica and John to get it done. Whatever you can contribute today will fuel a victory for reproductive rights — not just in Texas but nationwide. At a time when reproductive care is so restricted for Texas women and many are already forced to come as far as Maryland just to access abortion care, it’s unacceptable that an ANTI-choice Texas Democrat is willing to help the Republicans overturn Roe v. Wade. With just 5 days before her primary election, Jessica needs our support now. = | = Thank you for supporting pro-choice candidates, Team John King for Maryland * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178, or visit our _. subject: End the Crises! It’s time for America FIRST!
body:
It seems every day there is another self-made crisis forced upon hard-working Americans by the Radical Democrats.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cQ1FLJ_kWUCN7cHd_hfGriGlDzYiHkEbtYtGw9Je5T-v7JamqLDbBAw2gm4u5p3sngkpOaiVVEWUdMVsXOpfJ8Ii5kVke9NK2Te27dWmEKMBLj72eOotRdG_57iugPj1jiwUcqKWBpyc-0A-2Jauw5jdS0jzvXvqsAhe8W6RHRTA9YK-FsyZ9lWc9eXzcFY-raUugRjgn_08aK7mQnPuOw==&c=EZGI5zwsSrCjOp-YRvqodVaHkqMEao-DkMwD0jcIybo6daNTAYbqxw==&ch=SZ-j52ef4u2dDKbtH-AcsOGHXacld1f0yu3K1ArTLvEBh_eFAWtGhQ==)

| Friend
It seems every day there is another self-made crisis forced upon hard-working Americans by the Radical Democrats.
Wide-open borders, violent crime in our communities, skyrocketing prices on gas and everyday essentials, and radical socialism have become the norm in Biden's America.
We can not continue to suffer under the crises-filled Biden regime. We need to act NOW by building momentum for a MASSIVE red wave in November.

[This is why the time is now to build the momentum needed for a MASSIVE Red Wave in November. It's the only way to get America back on track. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cQ1FLJ_kWUCN7cHd_hfGriGlDzYiHkEbtYtGw9Je5T-v7JamqLDbBAw2gm4u5p3sngkpOaiVVEWUdMVsXOpfJ8Ii5kVke9NK2Te27dWmEKMBLj72eOotRdG_57iugPj1jiwUcqKWBpyc-0A-2Jauw5jdS0jzvXvqsAhe8W6RHRTA9YK-FsyZ9lWc9eXzcFY-raUugRjgn_08aK7mQnPuOw==&c=EZGI5zwsSrCjOp-YRvqodVaHkqMEao-DkMwD0jcIybo6daNTAYbqxw==&ch=SZ-j52ef4u2dDKbtH-AcsOGHXacld1f0yu3K1ArTLvEBh_eFAWtGhQ==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: In case you missed this one-"Why I'm running"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Checking in to make sure to make sure you saw Richard's email from yesterday.

Richard is hitting the campaign trail hard today. He's visiting with voters in Winona and Rochester discussing with them the issues that matter to everyday people such as **affordable healthcare, education, the environment and skyrocketing food prices.** This is a true grassroots campaign.

**[Richard will represent Main Street not Wall Street.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=d8c92041c1&e=8914b14955)**[** **](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=77afd8e30b&e=8914b14955)[Can you chip in to help us get our message out? $5, $25, $50, $100 or $250 will make a difference and help us bring a representative to Congress who will fight for you.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=3c5f5b61f8&e=8914b14955)

Thank you,

\---Team Painter

Dear Friend, The First District is a special place, a region that includes the Mayo Clinic, several colleges and universities, and vast farmland dotted with small towns filled with warm, hard-working people. That is why I am proud to be running for Congress for Minnesota’s First District. **I am running to be a problem solver and consensus builder.** I believe the First District needs someone who fights for working people on basic kitchen table issues - fighting price fixing for food and gas, fixing roads and bridges, and improving access to health care, education and good-paying jobs. The First District needs a representative in Congress who will stand up for our farmers, making sure they are paid well for the crops they produce, while also working to provide disaster relief in the face of the growing threat of climate change, where violent storms and droughts risk wiping out entire crops. **_Congress needs to appropriate funds now for emergency relief of farmers in the event of future extreme weather conditions._** _**Americans need someone who will fight to preserve our freedom and democracy, by holding accountable adversaries at home and abroad who seek to undermine our country.**_ We also must make sure our elections are secure and accessible to all. _I hope you will join me in our fight to tackle the challenges that the people of the First District share with many other Americans, not the issues some politicians use to divide us._ We face urgent problems, and we can't solve them without working together. For years, I have been fighting to clean up politics and ensure our elected leaders represent the interest of their constituents. Too many politicians in Washington have forgotten who they were elected to represent. They work for their big donors - not for the people. This campaign won’t take any corporate money and that is why I need your help. Can you help me today, so that I can work to represent ordinary Americans in Congress?[ A contribution of $5, $25, $100, $250 or whatever you're comfortable with giving will bring us one step closer to victory.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=77d4ff3ca0&e=8914b14955) This campaign is not about me. It is about preserving and building our democracy. Join us today and let's bring real change to Congress. Thank you, Richard Painter
---
| |
---
| [Contribute](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=1143e53dbd&e=8914b14955 "Contribute")

This campaign won’t take any corporate money and that is why I need your help. Can you help me today, so that I can work to represent ordinary Americans in Congress? This campaign is not about me. It is about preserving and building our democracy. Join us today and let's bring real change to Congress. Thank you, Richard Painter | | | "Contribute" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Richard Painter for US Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Accidental Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear he has his sights set on Colorado.
#
Can I explain something, Peter?
In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.”
To say the least, I was not an obvious choice.
But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with.
So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate, fighting for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.
But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear he has his sights set on Colorado. To make matters worse, we’re way behind our fundraising goal for the month.
**[We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10 or more to help my campaign and Patty Murray's reach our fundraising goals so we can have the resources to fight back and protect our seats? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45664722/346947147/-2090861800?refcode=pm_em_220523_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5ZTMxMy1lNGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuhjlFlBuT5kzHLMxYr_cdK3BACZF-R8NvdJlZCJ4-s=)**

We’re running a people-powered campaign, which means we want to hear directly from supporters like you — not powerful special interests — about what issues matter the most.

subject: I need you more than ever

body:

Friend,
I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much they gave.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my reelection.
Now that we’re in an election year, and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever.
**But here’s the thing: The NRSC just spent $1,000,000 in ONE WEEK on attack ads against me. If this is what they’re doing now, imagine what they’ll be doing in September.**
And I have to be honest with you: April wasn’t our strongest fundraising month. We can’t afford to have a slow May, too. So, I want to do something special. I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY. So, I’m asking:
**[Can you please split a $5 contribution between my reelection campaign and Jacky Rosen's? Help us reach our fundraising goals and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups that want to beat us. name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: Asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Together, we will drain the Madison swamp.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=5ded2ffaf85e4729a7c45a036406ebbf&_e=ayb9Py7eyKV5LEBPRPshlJ5vsjiQvL0SC0KT5SwznEieYaaxNj23rq3v5OsZAratElkp1jhUm4V4hZRkmwEBciqHRrNR-h9Zf4jYB4HrVzDx9WwBU3gvw9vSBIvuQpFHMv6pGe7Fuf1kMOzalrhgE8xJKfMhJlf8Jtn9liyTBEj-7wAcGUV-KEHwvuBWtQIQJ3U5B-2ou3EfVZk3kikMikVskufJsaKmyOpjzVpXYjIptTiiZHPsC9gqlqtfPgS6eearqCf6d5cv7W5E24ZT-9ak4LBD8oqNm7NXGE3utHSwLcY6ppmp2xfQPh3ByHqauD4AzgkOctzHwT_51Fa_dm40skTc6AbyapicP-AoAxZmKr33Maa9olmprE3Goy1OD1IEYHMdNDRMzmDzEisewu10TrgugO2s2d4TEqnyOlAOeYq2Ecq3p5DNV_s6kiOPs6bkJ0DcMvUBTzhmCx_sa8S4iQ94ZBJ-0aH2MfMlVNL1eiqIop-svBvnzL_vfVQHa7lTGEu8erjQg5x7YqNuYw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
12 years ago, I did what many thought was impossible when I defeated the Madison swamp’s insider candidates to become your lieutenant governor.
---
But after 8 years of Governor Walker and I fighting the special interest cronies – _and winning_ – it took all but a minute for radical liberal Tony Evers to allow them right back in.
---
**Now, as we’re fighting to flip Wisconsin, I’ve once again become public enemy #1 to the Madison swamp because they know they can NEVER control me.**
---
_This toss-up governor’s race isn’t just about how we beat the swamp before, it’s about how we’re going to drain it bone dry after we fire Evers._
---

clean_body: Together, we will drain the Madison swamp. | Friend, 12 years ago, I did what many thought was impossible when I defeated the Madison swamp’s insider candidates to become your lieutenant governor. But after 8 years of Governor Walker and I fighting the special interest cronies – and winning – it took all but a minute for radical liberal Tony Evers to allow them right back in. Friends — I’m honored to officially be North Carolina Democrats’ nominee for U.S. Senate. This moment could not have happened without the support of tens of thousands of people like you. It’s humbling. But the truth is, it is only going to get harder from here. There is a lot of work ahead of us to deliver real progress for our families — on lower costs, climate change, voting rights and more. That starts with winning this race and expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate. North Carolina’s open seat is our best chance to do that, but the Republican attack ads against me have already started. [**Will you become a General Election Founding Donor to flip North Carolina? When I won my first race for judge more than two decades ago, I never imagined my journey would lead all the way to Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court and now your nominee for U.S. Senate.
We’ve heard loud and clear that people want change in Washington. They are tired of watching as politicians continue to rig the system in favor of corporate special interests and the wealthy.
People want elected leaders who will listen and speak up for them. As your next Senator, I will continue to do what I have dedicated my life to — serving the people and fighting for justice. You and your family deserve nothing less.
But we need you with us in this fight. This is one of the toughest and most competitive Senate races anywhere in the entire country.

clean_body: I’m honored to officially be North Carolina Democrats’ nominee for U.S. Senate. Friends — I’m honored to officially be North Carolina Democrats’ nominee for U.S. Senate. This moment could not have happened without the support of tens of thousands of people like you. It’s humbling. But the truth is, it is only going to get harder from here. There is a lot of work ahead of us to deliver real progress for our families — on lower costs, climate change, voting rights and more. That starts with winning this race and expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate. North Carolina’s open seat is our best chance to do that, but the Republican attack ads against me have already started. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Cheri Beasley and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = When I won my first race for judge more than two decades ago, I never imagined my journey would lead all the way to Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court and now your nominee for U.S. Senate. We’ve heard loud and clear that people want change in Washington. They are tired of watching as politicians continue to rig the system in favor of corporate special interests and the wealthy. People want elected leaders who will listen and speak up for them. As your next Senator, I will continue to do what I have dedicated my life to — serving the people and fighting for justice. You and your family deserve nothing less. But we need you with us in this fight. This is one of the toughest and most competitive Senate races anywhere in the entire country. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Cheri Beasley and Martin Heinrich: | = = | = = | = = Democrats’ path to picking up a seat and expanding the Senate majority in November runs right through North Carolina. That is our best hope to defend our democracy and finally deliver meaningful change for our families. Thank you so much for your support. I’m grateful to every single person who has walked with us on this journey so far, and I look forward to continuing our hard work together through November and beyond to the United States Senate. — Cheri | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. 1. **The Columbia Democratic Club — the oldest and most active Democratic organization in Howard County, MD — just endorsed Wes for Governor of Maryland!**

2. **Race to the WH, an election forecaster, announced their projections in this incredibly heated gubernatorial primary, and Wes is in the lead!**

While this projection currently has us slated to win, it still only projects us receiving about 25% of the vote with a 38% chance of winning. We need to increase those odds by getting Wes’ name out there in even more communities across the state and building further support in these final weeks. **We’re officially in the final weeks before the June 7th primary.** Ballots have been out for weeks, and our yard sign fund needs a jump-start! That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 into our Yard Sign Fund to get them produced ASAP!

clean_body: | = Quick update, friend. We’re officially in the final weeks before the June 7th primary. Ballots have been out for weeks, and our yard sign fund needs a jump-start! That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 into our Yard Sign Fund to get them produced ASAP! = Redistricting has expanded the size of our district, and yard signs are a critical way to increase visibility and Asif’s name recognition to swing voters. So far, only 3% of voters have turned in their ballots, meaning there’s still time to show the strength of this grassroots campaign. Our race is just one of a handful across the country that are essential to flip from red to blue in order to hold the Democratic House Majority. California is a top-two primary state -- so we must make sure Asif comes out on top to make it on to the General Election and unseat Young Kim. = | **= = = =** Thanks for your support amplifying our message, Team Asif P.S. If you're in the district and would like a sign of your own, respond to this email directly and we’ll contact you as soon as they’re available. | Dr. Asif Mahmood is the Democratic candidate for Congress in California’s 40th District. | | The crises continue to mount. Inflation remains at a forty year high. Fuel for the first time is above $4.00 in all 50 states. We just had two mass shootings in one weekend. We have a baby formula shortage. We still have no control of the illegal influx of people and drugs at our Southern Border. And, Congress just approved $40 Billion of aid to Ukraine for its defense in a war against Russia. We can sit idle and allow this confluence of crises to erode the fiber and character of our country, or we can stand and display a character that will affect positive change through these crises.

On June 7, primary day, let’s start to stand with the character and voice of our votes that will begin this change by voting for leadership that will bring us victorious through this time. We must pull through this together as our individual and collective destinies our inherently bound by the direction, trajectory and success of this great Country!

Start the spread of great leadership on Jun 7th and vote Myron L. Hall for U. S. Senate! Together we will do this! Be Blessed,
Dr. Myron L. Hall
info@drhallforsenate.com

National Republicans like Trump are counting on our grassroots supporters being tuned out, but I know that isn’t the case.

_Michiganders are fired up and ready to win in these really tough races. Now, we just have to prove it._

Dan has always been a great colleague in Congress. We’ve worked together to pass legislation to support working Michigan families and the fact is, we need people like him to fight for us in Congress.

**This is going to be a tough race for Dan.** Kevin McCarthy and his special interest friends are already spending millions in this race. But I know from my own tough races that we can win this race and keep Michigan blue if we don’t lose momentum now.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/dan-debbie-2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45666263/346952065/-1680338188?amount=15&contactdata=lhPARpbd9Oa7qDKOVZjqmYdcsJlCAXkSWnwlfNzr5Vk74QdfY%2BH312bmXDGllWL3Fqf7x7vJumijxy%2BU0ThBTbcNsl2L3T6GpIvbxjQQIKxLK1Y%2BOjTVp3BVqKKiW9RiVYI1GfpA%2FSqRv6VIoLoviw%3D%3D&refcode2=b509bd07-e8da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_220523_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTA5YmQwNy1lOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aXjpi2nNUUtlKoHMWEMuXwHmyrQtl6tdfkg_8lutJ88=)**

Thank you,
Senator Debbie Stabenow

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! Now, we just have to prove it. As one of the top races nationwide, Dan needs your help before our May budget deadline. We’ve worked together to pass legislation to support working Michigan families and the fact is, we need people like him to fight for us in Congress. This is going to be a tough race for Dan. Kevin McCarthy and his special interest friends are already spending millions in this race. But I know from my own tough races that we can win this race and keep Michigan blue if we don’t lose momentum now. = Thank you, Senator Debbie Stabenow Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. Hi Peter,

Take a little trip with me: It's election night, 2020. Tensions are high, as we're all nervously awaiting the election results. The polls are in our favor, but nobody knows what could happen.

Four more years of Trump's chaos, cruelty, racism, and incompetence? Or will we change course, will democracy prevail, and set a course to get our country back on track? We're all biting our nails as Steve Kornaki comes back with breaking news and a somber tone, "well, folks. The math just isn't there, it looks like Trump and the GOP gets another 4 years."

And it's worse than we expected. Tucker Carlson becomes Chief of Staff, Dr. Oz is Chief Medical Advisor, Kevin McCarthy is Speaker of the House.

If we thought the first four years were bad,**the preceding two are _unimaginable._** COVID-19 runs rampant, without any coherent mask or vaccine policy, millions more people die.

Within one year, SCOTUS overturns _Roe_ and**a national abortion ban is passed,** co-sponsored by Mike Garcia. States scramble to find loopholes, but **nobody was prepared for this radical agenda.**

And that’s only the beginning. Key protections for the environment, women, the LGBTQ+ community, immigrants, all roll back one by one. EPA? **Gone.** Public lands? **National Parks are opened up for drilling and fracking.**_Obergefell_? **Overturned.** The Muslim ban is reinstated. Cruelty at the border knows no end, as families and children are ripped apart.

And Trump-appointed judges uphold every one of these cruel policies.

Republicans are finally successful at overturning the Affordable Care Act. Millions of people with pre-existing conditions are thrown off their health insurance, even COVID-19 becomes a pre-existing condition.

Luckily that’s not our reality. **In 2020 we fought hard, we mobilized, we protested, we organized, we voted, and we donated** to make sure this dark future did not come to pass. I hate to use these scare tactics, Peter, but we need to remember what's on the line.

We MUST do it again. If the recent leaked _Roe_ SCOTUS opinion, GOP efforts to undermine elections, and Republican alliances with white-nationalism and conspiracy theorists have taught us _anything_ , it's that**right-wing extremism knows no bounds.**

**Mike Garcia voted against certifying an election. If he's in the majority, there's no guarantee he wouldn't do it again in 2020. We cannot risk it.** We lost our last election against Mike Garcia by 333 votes, we’re not going to let that happen again.

[**Our future is on the line and I can’t flip this seat alone. Chip in $5 or more ahead of our June 7th primary so we can show Mike Garcia – and the entire GOP – we're not allowing their hateful, extreme policies to ever see the light of day again. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45666158/346951818/1076724892?refcode=em22_220523_BeforeTimes2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGZkMmNlOC1lN2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXLUj067-1cxrkVmj5yY-dXaEVaE4bhjnctFd9APy7g=)

I know we can prevent this dark future, but we must come together to stop it.

Onwards,

Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45666160/346951837/1076724892?refcode=em22_220523_BeforeTimes2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGZkMmNlOC1lN2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXLUj067-1cxrkVmj5yY-dXaEVaE4bhjnctFd9APy7g=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45666162/346951858/1076724892?refcode=em22_220523_BeforeTimes2
&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGZkMmNlOC1lN2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXLUj067-1cxrkVmj5yY-dXaEVaE4bhjnctFd9APy7g=)

name: Lukas Severson
subject: Team Benda Get Out The Vote
body:
Dear Team Benda,

Tomorrow is the day. Remember to get out and Vote Benda, May 24th! Team Benda will be doing some Get out the vote activities downtown Albert Lea. We will be waving Benda signs from 11:00 to 1:00 and 3:30 to 5:30. We will meet on the 200 block of S Broadway, Albert Lea MN 56007

See you there and remember to Vote Benda!

If you have a sign and would like to bring it or customize it like the signs below feel free!

\--

Lukas Severson
Campaign Manager
Benda For Congress
(507) 508-3148
\--

Lukas Severson
Campaign Manager
(507)508-3148
[Lukas@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:Lukas@bendaforcongress.com)

name: Peter Welch
subject: Our May fundraising deadline is a week away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
You can count on me to be ready and jump in the fight on Day One if I’m elected as your next Senator.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
Hello,
We’ve got an important end-of-month deadline a week from now, [**and I’m asking you to help reach our goal by making a $5 contribution to our campaign for Senate. Here’s why:**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=3&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
I’m running to keep this Senate seat blue at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and I believe Washington needs more Vermont values. We need more listeners and more doers, who will help deliver big, progressive victories we so desperately need.
You can count on me to be ready and jump in the fight on Day One if I’m elected as Vermont’s next Senator. But to win this race and protect our Senate majority from Mitch McConnell, we’ve got to keep hitting our monthly fundraising goals—and May’s is a big one.
[**If you’re able to, will you make a $5 contribution to this Senate campaign ahead of next Monday’s fundraising deadline? Your donation will grow this grassroots movement and spread the word about our campaign across Vermont.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=4&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=16&amount=3&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=18&amount=15&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=20&amount=28&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=22&amount=50&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=12&amount=100&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=14&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---

---
I believe in bipartisanship and building alliances across the aisle, but Mitch McConnell and all too many Republicans in Washington have shown no interest in getting things done for the folks they’re supposed to serve. In fact, they’ve been explicit about undercutting anything Democrats propose, and families suffer as a result.
With the Senate hanging in the balance, it’s crucial we do everything we can to protect this seat. From health care to climate change to our democracy itself, so much is at stake. This is an All Hands On Deck moment, one that could mean so much for the future of our country.
[**Chip in $5 right away to help keep this seat—and the Senate—in Democratic hands.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2742?t=8&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
Thanks so much,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22may?refcode=em_20220523_f_p_dayone&refcode2=440_61531_frPZjw&akid=440%2E61531%2EfrPZjw)
---
---

---|---|---

P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477

Friend, we need to know what these congressmen know about the worst domestic terror attack in decades. They must testify or face consequences for contempt. | If you agree that the GOP conspirators must be held accountable, sign the official petition! Bill Pascrell is at the forefront of the fight to protect and rebuild our democracy. That fight starts by holding accountable the criminals responsible for the January 6th insurrection. That's why Bill was the first to call for the criminal prosecution of Donald Trump, and he demanded that any member of Congress who aided in the planning of the January 6th plot against the United States not be seated in Congress as laid out in section 3 of the 14th Amendment. Thank you, — Team Pascrell The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Grand jury investigation into Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend: My last email (below) was too important not to move to the top of your inbox. New reporting suggests that a grand jury investigation is now underway into Donald Trump's mishandling of classified information. These allegations are in addition to what we already know about his shady business dealings and incitement of insurrection - so it's clear that Trump and his family's house of cards is wobbling.
---
He could soon face charges - but with the Republican Party focused on their cult-like defense of Trump, it's critical for all concerned Americans to raise their voices to demand full accountability.
**[I still need 231 more Democrats to sign my petition before midnight. If you agree that criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump, please click here to add your name now.](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-may-jury?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1185-su-nd)**
Thank you for speaking out for the rule of law,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Wed, May 18, 2022
Subject: Grand jury investigation into Trump

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4QRxfEMA%2B%2FDxvLDaXJ%2F4%2FBDGg%2BUJCp%2FJ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
There's been yet another major development in the criminal case against Donald Trump: **According to a New York Times report, a federal grand jury investigation into the disgraced former president 's mishandling of classified information is now underway. **
After inciting a deadly insurrection on our Capitol, Trump left the White House for Mar-a-Lago with, allegedly, hundreds of sensitive documents that belong to all of us by law - once again putting our nation's security and democratic institutions at risk.
The hypocrisy here would almost be unbelievable - if it weren't Donald Trump we were speaking about. As a candidate for the White House in 2016, Trump made smears about Hillary Clinton's classified emails a pillar of his campaign. Yet here he is, years later, brazenly violating rules he claimed to care about so much.
Grassroots supporters like you, Friend, have been leading the charge when it comes to demanding accountability for Trump, his family, and accomplices. But at this critical moment, we must keep raising our voices. For while he may not be on the ballot this coming November, his blind followers are. Each competing to "out-Trump" the other, pining for his endorsement. They are committed to continuing his destruction of our values and institutions. We must not let that happen.
**I 'm asking you to speak out and hold the disgraced former president accountable. To stop the creeping infection that he brings to our nation and our politics. [In light of all we now know, do you agree that criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump? Click here to add your voice before our 11:59 p.m. deadline. ](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-may-jury?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1185-su-nd)**
Thank you for doing your part to ensure Trump and his cronies are held accountable in the eyes of the law.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=prhvBYss8GlFMkXC6rCq52501asvElUv&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Russia's foreign ministry released a list of Americans that are now banned from entering the country and I'm proud to say that I am on the list!| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a48f18c984994de8ba204ca2c1a0ccc2&_e=eb38Bcj7dky_GwEYX07kbaJQ1PGjD6GUP9tvEBw-fsrlGfgVeeRKucBDrc5iEYbANUIKg1R8YvrQ3k0CE7AIZ8Yfn50t7MkPq1JuoGEM12u3mkmE0q6sPuv8RxRY761eg_83RfnT6m_zYGDTnv0Xj5oxTy9JLd_XOfreVvt-6ND5WWWBXlpLQtfC0AA8o-bhw-FMaAJythBwWSwx49wC3GuCuj58fWpq0Y1-TXficyXl6G4i078EJ98uRrgcIVyqCXoDuAuDFKVCdqwMSm6P0w%3D%3D)

Peter, Russia's foreign ministry released a list of Americans who are banned from entering the country and it’s a badge of honor to be among such good company on this list! I guess Putin is a little sensitive about those of us that have rightfully been calling out his murderous regime and barbaric war in Ukraine.

clean_body: What I had to say to our dedicated supporters. | | | Hey Peter, how are you doing! I was campaigning in Clarksville when I got together with my team to record a quick message for all our grassroots supporters. Peter, together, we’re gonna remove Mark Green from this seat because we’re here to protect women’s rights and we’re here to protect democracy. I’m so glad y’all are part of this movement. Thanks, Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

subject: He let non-citizens vote

The Senate Majority depends on taking back Nevada in November. Every Democrat knows it and is spending millions to defend this seat. We can’t afford to have a "Republican" who’s caved to Democrats and the Establishment at every turn.

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Take a look at what Beto has been up to (photos enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

This is a
longer email about the many veterans who’ve sacrificed their comfort and
security for ours. And to every veteran reading these words, we thank you
for your service.

From the members of Company E in World War II, to those who’ve served in
Korea, Vietnam, the first Gulf War, Afghanistan, Iraq, and elsewhere
abroad, veterans devote their lives to serving all of us, and they should
know that we’re going to do everything in our power to serve all of them
when they return home.

If you’d like to hear more about Beto’s recent Veterans Town Halls across
Texas, keep reading. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]But if you’re ready to elect a governor in Texas
with a proven track record of delivering for veterans, will you consider
pitching in $3 or more now to support our grassroots
campaign?

Beto has a long history of getting things done for veterans. As a member
of the House Veterans Affairs Committee, Beto passed bipartisan
legislation to expand health care for veterans while also decreasing wait
times at the VA.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Beto representing House Armed Services Committee in 2016

As governor, Beto will continue working across the aisle to create a Texas
that finally delivers for all of those who served all of us.

That’s why we just hosted a multi-city tour across Texas focused
completely on meeting with, listening to, and working alongside veterans
across this state.

Beto kicked off the tour last Friday at Veterans of Foreign Wars Post 8790
in Houston. He joined veterans and community members to talk about the
issues that face veterans in our state, and what we can do to address
them.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Houston Veterans Town Hall

Houston

In San Antonio, Beto held a rally at the oldest VFW hall in Texas, where
he condemned the Texas legislature for working to strip voting rights from
disabled veterans. It’s clear we need a governor who cares about every
voice being heard.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Beto meeting a supporter

San Antonio

In San Angelo, Beto met with Republicans, Democrats, and Independents
alike who are willing to cross the aisle and work together to ensure Texas
delivers for our veterans.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]San Angelo Veterans Town Hall [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]San Angelo Veterans Town Hall

San Angelo

In Abilene and Wichita Falls, Beto kept the focus on real solutions:
ending veteran homelessness, reducing suicide rates, and improving health
care.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Abilene Veterans Town Hall

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Wichita Falls Veterans Town Hall

Abilene and Wichita Falls

Today, Beto’s on his way to Killeen to host another Veterans Town Hall.
But needless to say, our campaign’s focus on delivering for veterans
doesn’t stop today.

Through his years of service to veterans in El Paso and Texas, and
countless conversations across the state, Beto knows that Texas veterans
deserve better than Abbott. Veterans are our pride, and Texas needs a
governor who serves every single one of them.

Together, we're building the largest organizing program Texas has ever
seen — because that's what it's going to take to defeat Abbott and elect a
governor who truly cares for ALL of the people of Texas. But we can't do
this without you, so we have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Please, will you chip in $3 or more today to join this
people-powered movement for the leadership Texas needs and deserves? Your
donation will go directly to helping defeat Abbott.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220523-1?refcode=ema20220523-190638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1028&refcode2=190638_444211_JCLQy3&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3 ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being a part of this,

Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=190638%2E444211%2EJCLQy3

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

You call, you write, you wave at her staffers moving past you on the parade float—they tossed some budget candy at you, but did she get your messages? You begin to question: _Is it me? Am I wrong to want affordable healthcare? Protection for pre-existing conditions? Paid family leave...?_ Maybe Ann is right and I should tighten the belt, quit asking for safe roads and schools, support tax loopholes for predatory bankers who just want to feed their shareholders and put a new, even larger roof over their CEO’s vacation home in Jackson Hole. Corporations are people, too, as Ann reminds us. But, please, don’t doubt yourself. It’s way simpler than all that: _**She’s just not that into you. **_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667525/346957208/572942802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q0OWYzMC1lZWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyiDZ7Vyr-FU_aXQbyl7QBZGfGi36AuXIugviQTDhVk=&emci=f1ba3b8e-d7da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=73d49f30-eeda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=14943357) Since 2012, our United States Representative has neglected us, the people she is sworn to represent.
