body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667656/346957663/-1747990279?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=)
Peter,

On Wednesday, House Democrats took action to address the urgent infant formula shortage by passing the _Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act_ , which would grant the FDA $28 million in emergency funding to help address supply chain challenges, safely boost formula production, and prevent a crisis like this from happening again.
**Do you support emergency funding to address the baby formula shortage?** | [YES! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667657/346957664/401123889?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all_yes&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=) | [No »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667658/346957665/401123889?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all_no&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=)
---|---
**Despite the urgent need for funding to address the baby formula shortage, House Republicans overwhelmingly voted against the bill, proving once again how GOP leaders will turn their backs on hard-working families at every turn.**

Emilia is running for Congress to be a champion for Northeast Ohioans, and she will always fight for our families and children to have the resources they need.

It’s more critical than ever that we elect leaders like Emilia to protect our House majority so Democrats can continue to deliver vital pieces of legislation like the _Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act._
**Emilia wants to know what you think, Peter: Do you support Democrats’ effort to address the baby formula shortage?** [YES! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667659/346957666/401123889?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all_yes&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=) | [No »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667660/346957667/401123889?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all_no&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=)
---|---

Thank you for your time,

Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667661/346957668/-1747990279?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45667662/346957669/-1747990279?refcode=em_poll_2022.05.23_b1_eshq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JiMTI0NC1lZmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pu85NaKDLH_J-FcVB33a543w2fpvv2zRqCWRlV4-vw=)

I’m not worried yet, though. Our amazing grassroots team has _always_ shown up to help us close the gap for Patty, and we won’t stop now! **We’re one week out from our final May fundraising push. name: Alex Walker
subject: We can beat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12241?t=6&akid=2594%2E878179%2E5Hv_zx) Our best chance to defeat MAGA-extremist Lauren Boebert is to support common-sense Democrat Alex Walker.

[**Will you split a donation between his grassroots team and Voter Protection Project ahead of his upcoming primary election?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12241?t=7&akid=2594%2E878179%2E5Hv_zx) | [CHIP IN $5 TO ELECT ALEX WALKER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12242?t=8&akid=2594%2E878179%2E5Hv_zx)
---
Team –

Data shows that we can defeat Lauren Boebert if we have more nationwide support.

This is our one chance to finally get rid of the most toxic and dangerous Republicans in Congress – and we cannot afford to fall short so close to election day.

And Lauren has big plans if we let her win...

**X** She wants to impeach President Biden

**X** Along with her best friends Marjorie Taylor Greene and Madison Cawthorn, she wants to make abortion illegal and target the LGBTQ+ community with more bills like “Don’t Say Gay”

name: Team Slotkin
subject: What is a “scam PAC?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220523&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220523&amount=28]
Team,
One of our main goals in sending you these emails is to keep you informed, and give you a peek behind the curtain of our country’s (slightly strange) political process. Whether that’s breaking down legislation, giving you a behind-the-scenes look at what it’s really like to run for office, or – in the case of today’s email – informing you of the latest shady fundraising tactic; we like to make sure you’re in the loop.
Our guess is you get a lot of emails asking for money for political candidates. Sometimes, those emails are from the candidate themselves or their team (like the emails we send you). Others are from political action committees (PACs) or other organizations raising money on behalf of a candidate or group of candidates. Frankly, there are a near-endless number of organizations that do this, and in most cases, it’s helpful for the candidates involved.
However, like seemingly anything else in political fundraising, there are some bad actors that take advantage of this system. We call them “scam PACs.”
The name is pretty self-explanatory. These are fake groups that send emails pretending to be legitimate organizations raising money for specific candidates. They often show the name and photo of these candidates to make it seem legitimate. But the candidates mentioned never actually see the money, as the groups pocket the cash for themselves – or for a network of LLCs and consulting groups made up of the very same people that run the PAC.
It’s an incredibly shady practice that tends to fly under the radar, which brings us to the question: how do you spot a scam PAC? The best way is to do your research. Check to see if the named organization has a website where they show actual results, or proof of their work. Or, check out the Federal Election Commission’s website. The FEC has a search function where you can see how each and every registered PAC is spending their money. Are these PACs actually giving to candidates, or just a constellation of consultants?
Donating your hard-earned money to a candidate you believe in shouldn’t come with the risk of being scammed. Since she first ran for Congress, Elissa has been committed to running an ethical fundraising program by refusing to accept money from corporate PACs and never throwing fake deadlines or “sky-is-falling” rhetoric at you. It’s unfortunate that all candidates and organizations can’t say the same, but we here at Team Slotkin will continue to call out bad actors when we see them and keep you in the loop on what to watch out for!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220523&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

| | Peter – When I announced my candidacy for Congress, my goal was to make this campaign about the people of the First District – by listening to as many voters as possible from every walk of life and every county in the First District. I spent today in the southern part of our district, speaking with voters & community leaders in Waycross and Baxley.

Tomorrow is Election Day, and our team will be stationed throughout the district to make sure folks get out to vote in the Democratic Primary. This election represents so much – the hope of a better future, America’s promise of true democracy, and the power of the people of the First District. Remind your family and friends to vote, and if you’re in the district I hope to see you at the polls tomorrow! name: Mark Kelly
subject: I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I’ll be honest, I never thought this is how it would go.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)
| | [CHIP IN $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)
---
_Your contribution will be split between Mark Kelly for Senate and the DSCC to keep Arizona and the Senate blue._
Friends —

I’ll be honest with you:

When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out.

I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family — and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get.

I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me.

And I never thought that I’d need to ask you to do more than that to defend this seat.

But I do need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, Trump says beating me is the first step to "taking back America," and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year.

So please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election and the DSCC, but **I really need you if we’re going to hold Arizona’s seat and our Senate majority against the National Republican groups coming to take them.**

**[Can you PLEASE split a $5 contribution between my campaign and the DSCC, before tonight’s critical fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Mark Kelly and the DSCC.
| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)

---

Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part.

Mark Kelly

U.S. Senator, Arizona

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is running for re-election in Arizona. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, cut taxes for hardworking families, and create good-paying jobs.
[**Will you help Mark Kelly and the DSCC fight back against National Republicans and hold the Senate?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/3591?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220523-Kelly-CampaignTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=4412%2E9716520%2EkYrICN)

### _Former Attorney General Doug Gansler is running for governor to make Maryland safe. Gansler has 22 years of experience fighting crime - first as a federal prosecutor, then as Montgomery County State's Attorney, and finally as Attorney General. In addition to prosecuting some of the state's most high-profile cases, including the Beltway Sniper, Gansler has a record of launching innovative and successful programs to protect the public while instituting progressive reforms to the criminal justice system. _ _Former Hyattsville Mayor Candace Hollingsworth was the city 's youngest and first Black mayor. After a combined nine years of service on City Council and as mayor, Candace founded the national organization Our Black Party to wake folks up and fortify a change-making relationship between the Black community and the political system. As mayor, Candace focused on making Hyattsville a safe and just community through expanding education, economic opportunities and civic engagement for young people while supporting the long-term sustainability of her city._
---
By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair.

Peter,

I worked with President Trump to build the wall at our southern border and curb illegal immigration that brings drugs, crime and even national security threats into our country.

subject: No one — absolutely no one — is above the law
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
This is what my grandfather, Watergate special prosecutor Leon Jaworski instilled in me and I have carried it throughout my legal career. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13655454?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2e5475dfed&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , "From Watergate we learned what generations before us have known —**** our Constitution works. And during Watergate years it was interpreted again so as to reaffirm that no one — absolutely no one — is above the law." My grandfather, **Watergate special prosecutor Leon Jaworski** , spoke these words when he had the guts to take on President Nixon. **He instilled this value in me and I have carried it throughout my legal career and as Mayor of Galveston.**

**Now I'm ready to take the fight for what is right to Ken Paxton and put an end to corrupt administration.**

I'm ready to fight for reproductive rights. I'm ready to create a voter access division so that every Texan can legally and easily cast their vote. And I'm going to lead the fight for legal cannabis in Texas.

Finally, I'm going to bring much needed ethics and integrity back to the AG's office.

It's time to send Paxton the same message my grandfather sent to Nixon: **No one — absolutely no one — is above the law.**

[**Please donate whatever you can today to help us finish the runoff election strong. We need the help of good Texans all across our state to turn Texas blue. Chip in today to help our effort.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8ec0ed2ff9&e=5d8d80652b)

— Joe

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]

Trump’s UNPRECEDENTED degree of control over the GOP is making us terrified.
Across the board, he’s supporting anti-democratic, ‘big lie’ supporting extremists, especially for Secretary of State elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_052322_B3_AC_30D]
Will you rush $10 or more to help us elect Democratic Secretaries of State ready to stand up to the ‘big lie’? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_052322_B3_AC_30D]

We can’t emphasize enough how dangerous Trump’s influence is. Unless we elect and re-elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the country, our democracy will be in even more danger than it is now.
Should Kristina Karamo, Mark Finchem, and the rest of Trump’s hand-picked Secretary of State candidates win next year, they’ll be in a position to overturn or delegitimize the 2024 election results. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_052322_B3_AC_30D]
Thankfully, we can STOP this dangerous plan right in its tracks. But it’s not going to be easy, friend. We’ll need Democrats across the country to step up and pitch in to help defeat the far-right.
They’re heading into November with an unprecedented amount of momentum and fundraising behind them, and right now we’re at risk of being totally swamped by their dark money. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_052322_B3_AC_30D]
The stakes couldn’t be any higher. Democracy itself needs your help today – will you rush $10 ASAP to help defeat Trump’s plan to destroy American democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_052322_B3_AC_30D]

Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

subject: Republicans are ramping up their attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668631/346965691/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2UzMGVlMS1mNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HigXYJAc1-ieNuWisgcL3hJTxaBGdMrbG3t2h_pt5E=&emci=ca8b305f-bcda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=47e30ee1-f5da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Ever since last week's debate, Republicans have been ramping up their attacks. From social media posts to outrageous ad spending, they will stop at nothing to silence anyone who is beholden to the will of Arizona's voters.
According to a recent poll, **90% of Arizona voters support the right to safe and legal abortion care**(NARAL Pro-Choice America, 2022)**.** Arizonans are fighting to defend their freedom to decide, _and it’s time lawmakers listen._
**Republicans know that as** **your representatitve I will do everything I can to champion federal legislation that will enshrine our right to safe and legal abortion care. **And frankly — they don't like that about me or my campaign.
[**That's why I'm asking you to help us fight back. Can I count on you to chip in today and help my campaign fight back against these unwarranted attacks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668632/346965692/558373307?refcode=X_052322_RepublicansAreAttacking&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2UzMGVlMS1mNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HigXYJAc1-ieNuWisgcL3hJTxaBGdMrbG3t2h_pt5E=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668633/346965694/41694283?refcode=X_052322_RepublicansAreAttacking&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2UzMGVlMS1mNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HigXYJAc1-ieNuWisgcL3hJTxaBGdMrbG3t2h_pt5E=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668634/346965696/41694283?refcode=X_052322_RepublicansAreAttacking&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2UzMGVlMS1mNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1HigXYJAc1-ieNuWisgcL3hJTxaBGdMrbG3t2h_pt5E=)

I’m in this fight for you all the way,
Kirsten

name: Alvin Williams, President
subject: John James is about to thwart their entire takeover plot...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
I’m putting this at the TOP of your inbox.
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=1)
---
| Peter, There's nothing Democrats fear more than outspoken Black conservatives exposing their Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives to Black voters... ...but a popular Black, Christian conservative, _Army combat veteran, and successful businessman_ like John James **running for Congress** is the **Democrats' worst nightmare**. **[I'm hoping you'll endorse John James for the U.S. House of Representatives, but first let me explain why the Democrats are so terrified of him.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=2)** The Democrats are gearing up for war, and they fully expect to maintain control of the House this election. **But behind the scenes,_they're terrified_ that John James is about to thwart their entire takeover plot.** And they have good reason to be afraid. | [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=3)
---
##### Captain John James will be the next U.S. Congressman from Michigan, but only with your help.
After all, they saw first-hand in previous elections what John is capable of - _watching in horror as he soared from a 21-point deficit to just 7 points within a few short months._
Shocked that their supposedly _"unbeatable"_ Senator was on the verge of losing to a _"nobody"_ political outsider...
...the panicked Democrats were forced to dump **over $15 million** into slowing down John's relentless surge just enough for well-known, deep-pocketed, and entrenched Democrat Senator Debbie Stabenow to narrowly squeak past.
# John James won more votes (1.9 million) than ANY Republican in Michigan in over a decade.
The Democrats are terrified because they know that if John can nearly topple one of the most powerful Democrats in the U.S. Senate...
**...then they don't stand a chance against John James this election!**
John is a successful, articulate, and intelligent Black conservative whose impeccable character is impossible for liberals to deface with slander and lies.
He's a West Point graduate, Ranger-qualified aviation officer, and retired Army Captain who served with distinction while leading two Apache helicopter platoons in Iraq.
He's also a successful businessman, having quadrupled his company's revenue and added 100 new employees in his first 5 years as President.
And through each step of his journey, John has led with courage, conviction, and a servant-first mentality that comes from his Christian faith.
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=4)
---
##### "I am a conservative who happens to be black. I'm in the Republican Party because the platform most aligns with my values. I am pro-life. I am pro-Second Amendment. I am pro-family. I am pro-business."
John calls himself an _"unapologetic Christian, pro-life, pro-business, pro-Second Amendment, conservative outsider"_ but Fox News and others are calling him _**"The future of the GOP."**_
**[And if this isn't enough to make you want to help send John James to the U.S. House of Representatives...](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=5)**
**...let me tell you what scares the Democrats most about John James.**
**John is on a mission to reclaim Black voters by exposing the Liberal LIE that conservatives like you and me are racists.**
He's opening their eyes to the _"Democratic brand of dependency that's being peddled"_ by unmasking Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who prey on Blacks with lies, empty promises, and failed policies.
And John's damning critiques of the Democrat Party and honest outreach to the Black Community are reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party.
**John James is a serious threat to the Democrat Party, and they know it!**
_"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**He will be a star.** "_
-President Donald Trump
---
**To say the Democrats are panicking would be an understatement.**
They know John can reclaim enough Black voters to convert Michigan from a long-standing Democrat stronghold into the newest "red state."
And they know that winning a U.S. Congressional race will catapult John to national stardom, guaranteeing that millions of Black voters across America will hear his powerful message and begin fleeing the Democrat Party.
Once elected, Congressman John James will work tirelessly to:
* **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation
* **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party
* **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community

**And Democrats know that if they lose just 12% of the Black vote, it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election.**
# That's why Democrats are terrified of John James and WILL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP
**[That’s why I pray you'll also make an urgent, recurring donation of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to help John FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=6)**
BAMPAC Action Fund played an ACTIVE roll helping John James shrink the margin between him and his opponent in the previous election.
With your help, we were able to place billboards in key areas throughout Michigan, like the one you see here:
[](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=7)
---
We also ran radio ads in 3 of the largest black communities in Michigan and reached voters through online video ads in 10 key Michigan counties.
These online video ads were targeted towards Black Americans who’d voted in 2 of the last 4 elections up to that point.
And with your help... _we’ll do it again!_
John James really is _**"the future Republicans have been waiting for,"**_ but that future may never arrive without your committed support.
The Democrats are desperate to STOP John from taking this critical Congressional seat and END his campaign to recruit Black voters to the Republican Party.
And make no mistake about it: the future of our shared conservative values depends on our ability to reclaim Black voters from the Democrats.
**[That’s why your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more is so critical now more than ever!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=8)**
Real change takes time and commitment, and I know that you’re in this fight for the long-haul.
I know you won’t allow our conservative values to fall to the wayside by failing to build a conservative future.
That’s why I’m counting on your help TODAY.
**[So please help defend John James from Democrat attacks and DESTROY the liberal lies with your _monthly_ gift of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=9)**
Thank you, and God Bless.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=10)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=11)
---
**P.S.** John James is the **Democrats' worst nightmare** because he's reclaiming Black voters to the Republican Party by exposing the Liberal LIES about "racist" conservatives that keep Blacks voting for Democrats... **...and he's the ONLY ONE who can win this crucial House race and thwart their plans to retake the U.S. House of Representatives this election.** **That's why they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP!** **[That’s why I pray you'll make an urgent, monthly contribution of $10, $20.22, $28, $40, $75 or more to support John James up through Election Day.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=12)** **As a conservative leader in your community, your support is critical to beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel John James to victory.[So please give what you can today.](https://www.bampac.org/johnjamesbaf?info=2022ER0503&recruiter_id=62452&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=13)**
---
|
###### © Black America's PAC Action Fund
###### Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---
You're receiving this email because you've been critical to our mission of reclaiming Black voters, destroying the Liberal Lies, and supporting Black conservative candidates like John James, Tim Scott, and Burgess Owens. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022er0503&n=14) to stop receiving emails.
---

subject: Keep our digital ads running >>
body:
... make sure voters know the truth about Kevin McCarthy -- and it's working. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668701/346971044/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668702/346971045/-674430938?refcode=em-5.23.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)** to fund our digital outreach efforts. But first, I want to pull back the curtain and explain our strategy to unseat Kevin McCarthy.

We're mounting a serious campaign to make sure voters know the truth about Kevin McCarthy -- _and it's working._ Folks are beginning to realize that while McCarthy defends Trump and the far right, our community suffers. CA-20 is one of the poorest regions in the state, and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing about it.

**One of the most effective tools we have is our digital program to spread the word about my campaign.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668703/346971046/-674430938?refcode=em-5.23.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)
Right now, we're running online ads (like the one above) to raise awareness and grassroots funds to spread the word that I am the viable option to to replace McCarthy. Voters are responding with enthusiasm. But with ballots in hand, we need to ramp up significantly -- that means meeting the mark on every fundraising goal.

That's why I need to ask:

**[We still need to fully fund our digital ads program through June 7th so we can CRUSH Kevin McCarthy. Will you chip in $3 before midnight? Just 6 contributions from 18326 should put us over the top.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668704/346971047/-674430938?refcode=em-5.23.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668705/346971048/-674430938?refcode=em-5.23.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)

| [Chip in $35 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45668706/346971049/-674430938?refcode=em-5.23.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA4MzM0MC1mOGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1clBR20HYg_7IRQqNFhy88OeP5JO5eI4Kyk_purpETA=)

# Where is Tom Kean Jr?
---
|
---
**Today Tom Kean Jr failed to show up for yet another debate
(that makes three).**

For months now, voters have been asking, w _here 's Tom?_ On the issues, on debate stages, and in general on the campaign trail.

For years now, New Jerseyans have similarly been wondering - where has Tom Jr been - our "leader" when it comes to standing up for our values and building our party. He has lost our Republican majority in NJ and we cannot afford to export those kind of "results" to DC.

**Tired of asking where 's Tom? Vote John on June 7th...here's why:**
| | [ ](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=98dea766d8&e=0a69e2b984)
---
|
---

**By nominating Tom for a third time you may likely be asking yourself this same question come November, _as the polls show he could lose yet again._**

|
---
| | |

Peter, **Like you, I supported President Trump's efforts to build the wall at our southern border and curb illegal immigration that brings drugs, crime, and even national security threats into our country.** Now -- Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the radical Left are erasing all of our good work to keep our communities safe by opening our borders to illegal immigrants and allowing hundreds of thousands to walk in unimpeded. Under Biden's disastrous policies, MS-13 gang members and human traffickers are taking advantage of the Left's apathy - **and no one is stopping them.** [**I need your help to fight back - will you chip in $25 or more now to help me secure the Republican nomination and flip the U.S. House back to Republican control?**](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6d7b2eb4102f6464/23b8b86161a6bd6cc3d6b838967d376c/40203)[](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6d7b2eb4102f6464/f85df0616e9d0ac8c3d6b838967d376c/40203)

Biden's open borders policy is one of **the greatest threats to our personal safety and national security that no one is talking about.** Thanks to Joe Biden, **every town has become a border town.** The drugs that get brought across our borders get circulated around the country. That's why I am fighting back against the Biden-Pelosi-Spanberger open borders policy -- it's not just about protecting our laws; it's about keeping us safe! **[But I need your support in this fight.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6d7b2eb4102f6464/fcbcdff82afec9e5c3d6b838967d376c/40203)** **As your Congresswoman, I will fight to reinstitute the tough and effective Trump-era policies that were stemming the flow of illegal immigration over our southern border.** I support completing the wall, re-enacting the Remain in Mexico program, and ending the failed catch-and-release scheme. _Biden has undone all of this._ **[JOIN ME - take a stand today in our fight for LAW AND ORDER and BORDER SECURITY.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/6d7b2eb4102f6464/03af41e56d27a922c3d6b838967d376c/40203)** In Liberty,

subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
if you mess with our children, we will see you in court!

| [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkE1PxCAQhn9Ne6NhgaXtoYeuu_Wga8zG6JHQAXaJ9COUxuivd2r0bMLpIe_MO49pDBi9g9w3jDJG94wzKipaFs4wCqXbWTC0ZlWVCaqDjamIdl774EGPSS_vbopgC5iG_NZQKnjJKtlDbUBSC2C14LXjztKKC5m_ndVZ--DH65MebBOTU3FROCx9KXA6kKDXqNWeME4YU7s8NLeU5iXjbcY6fIuFNdpCj9ZMaduKDOyYbCRYhODQuBUjwfdY9XP7Fbx3fV3L3lEAJoR0e5vxbk2DWqYVy2f8eDjek8vpNWNyw4M1fh0Qn86_BPQwa38dkf1ZUphRd137qB4OrcKwep7mFpIml5fuLzZhszFhCi_NY2PmDx-CX2SJMq8DmvgRl_4X8Q02UInY)
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she's a "boy" and hid it from her mother...

So, we're dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children.

[**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I'm asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can't brainwash any more children.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkE1PxCAQhn9Ne6NhgaXtoYeuu_Wga8zG6JHQAXaJ9COUxuivd2r0bMLpIe_MO49pDBi9g9w3jDJG94wzKipaFs4wCqXbWTC0ZlWVCaqDjamIdl774EGPSS_vbopgC5iG_NZQKnjJKtlDbUBSC2C14LXjztKKC5m_ndVZ--DH65MebBOTU3FROCx9KXA6kKDXqNWeME4YU7s8NLeU5iXjbcY6fIuFNdpCj9ZMaduKDOyYbCRYhODQuBUjwfdY9XP7Fbx3fV3L3lEAJoR0e5vxbk2DWqYVy2f8eDjek8vpNWNyw4M1fh0Qn86_BPQwa38dkf1ZUphRd137qB4OrcKwep7mFpIml5fuLzZhszFhCi_NY2PmDx-CX2SJMq8DmvgRl_4X8Q02UInY)

In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you.

One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a "boy."

What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual.

Her daughter didn't even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs...

The teachers recruited Jessica's daughter to join their "Equality Club" where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual.

The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom.

They even created a "Gender Support Plan" for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother's knowledge.

And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica's daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn't be "trusted."**

The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening...

They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children's education.

Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control...

It's disgusting. It's awful. And we have to stop them.

That's why I'm asking for your help today.

[**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFkE1PxCAQhn9Ne6NhgaXtoYeuu_Wga8zG6JHQAXaJ9COUxuivd2r0bMLpIe_MO49pDBi9g9w3jDJG94wzKipaFs4wCqXbWTC0ZlWVCaqDjamIdl774EGPSS_vbopgC5iG_NZQKnjJKtlDbUBSC2C14LXjztKKC5m_ndVZ--DH65MebBOTU3FROCx9KXA6kKDXqNWeME4YU7s8NLeU5iXjbcY6fIuFNdpCj9ZMaduKDOyYbCRYhODQuBUjwfdY9XP7Fbx3fV3L3lEAJoR0e5vxbk2DWqYVy2f8eDjek8vpNWNyw4M1fh0Qn86_BPQwa38dkf1ZUphRd137qB4OrcKwep7mFpIml5fuLzZhszFhCi_NY2PmDx-CX2SJMq8DmvgRl_4X8Q02UInY)

You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions...

Because the only way we're going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court.

The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica's daughter is just one example.

We know the California Department of Education and the teachers' associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents...

Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned?

Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views.

And we have an opportunity to stop it.

This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court!**

clean_body: All they do is stand in the way | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can. = Team, We all know the GOP is a circus of hypocritical obstructionists. But they just keep taking it another step further. Republicans call themselves “pro-life.” Then they vote against fixing the baby formula shortage. Republicans call themselves “tough on terrorism.” Then they vote against investigating white supremacist domestic terrorism. Republicans relentlessly bash Democrats for high gas prices. Then they vote against making gas companies’ price gouging illegal. The list goes on. Again and again, the GOP bends over backward to make it clear:they aren’t looking out for us. And we have to kick them out. = | = You can’t trust the Republican Party to get anything done for the American people any further than you can throw them. But don’t take it from me — Mitch McConnell himself said last year that “100% of their focus is on obstructing” Biden and the Democrats. Clearly, they care only about playing partisan politics for their own gain.That approach is leaving everyday Americans out to dry, and it has no place in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for all your support, team. — Eric | | | = = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 15th Congressional District. clean_body: We only have until 11:59 P.M. | Peter, Last week, I emailed you about keeping our first TV ad up... Well, I just got word that we still need to raise another $5,763 before the next ad buy deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to keep it on the airwaves across the district. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Juan Ciscomani Date: Thu, May 19, 2022 Subject: RE: Up on TV To: dpwillis67@gmail.com We’re fighting back against the Left’s ads blitz. | Peter, We just launched our first district-wide TV ad, which details Joe Biden’s failure on the border: Now, I’m counting on your support so we can keep our ad up and running. With Pelosi and the Left spending millions to reserve airtime in my district, it’s absolutely imperative that we stay on the airwaves and keep pushing our winning message to voters. As an immigrant myself, I understand the importance of fixing our broken immigration system and securing the border better than anyone. I also have years of professional experience working alongside Arizona’s border ranchers, sheriffs, and Border Patrol. That means I’m perfectly positioned to fight for the needs of Arizona’s 6th District and lead Republican efforts to finally solve Biden’s border crisis once I’m in Congress. But to get there, we’ve got to secure the funds we need to keep our ad up. Otherwise, the only thing voters will see are Pelosi and the Democrats’ lies and attacks. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Florida Update
subject: ALERT: “Judge blocks DeSantis Plan!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
But another recent decision has put his map back into effect
|
---

---
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45669028/346983562/1701009216?amount=20&refcode=20220523.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjYzJiOGRjLWZjZGEtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4U64XRJ8wC9dBC_N6-AD3z2kgpSnOpn96QOWr9OnaC0=)
---
We’ll let _Politico_ explain:
“Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ bid to remake the state’s congressional map was dealt a **major setback** ... after a state judge said he would **block the plan because of the way it scattered Black voters among several north Florida districts.**

DeSantis personally pushed the GOP-led Legislature to approve the map, which boosts the number of Republican-held seats in the nation’s third-largest state. The map also dismantles the north Florida district held by Rep. Al Lawson (D-Fla.), a Black Democrat.”
This was a personal blow for DeSantis, one of the nation’s worst map manipulators.

But we can’t declare victory just yet. **Florida’s First District Court of Appeals just reinstated a stay that has put the DeSantis map back into effect for now****.**

**_We have to stay vigilant and we have to keep fighting everywhere Republicans have gerrymandered_** , in and out of court and all across the country.

**Can you help by making an immediate donation to the NDRC?**

clean_body: But another recent decision has put his map back into effect | | = We’ll let Politico explain: “Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ bid to remake the state’s congressional map was dealt a major setback ... after a state judge said he would block the plan because of the way it scattered Black voters among several north Florida districts. DeSantis personally pushed the GOP-led Legislature to approve the map, which boosts the number of Republican-held seats in the nation’s third-largest state. The map also dismantles the north Florida district held by Rep. Al Lawson (D-Fla.), a Black Democrat.” This was a personal blow for DeSantis, one of the nation’s worst map manipulators. But we can’t declare victory just yet. Florida’s First District Court of Appeals just reinstated a stay that has put the DeSantis map back into effect for now. We have to stay vigilant and we have to keep fighting everywhere Republicans have gerrymandered , in and out of court and all across the country. Can you help by making an immediate donation to the NDRC? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s get right back in the fight. Thanks, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

clean_body: | | | Republicans want to end all early voting | | | Team, late last week, the AZ GOP quietly tried to end early voting for Arizonans, filing another lawsuit to end the practice. After being rebuked earlier this year by the AZ Supreme Court, they filed a new lawsuit in a Republican-friendly county, hoping to end early voting for 90 percent of those who use it. It’s just another tactic to promote Trump’s lies, while trying to suppress Arizona voters. Unable to marshall the votes in the state legislature – the AZ GOP has repeatedly filed bogus lawsuits trying to get the courts to end the permanent early voting list and early voting altogether. While they file these lawsuits, the AZ GOP erodes our voting rights with new laws, targeting any community they view as unlikely to vote for them. As long as they are in control of so many state-level offices, it’s not going to stop. We can only stop these attacks by winning in November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Help us fight back, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Join us today, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize to
Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General
Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022!

Congressional races are heating up, and we’ll be strategizing directly
with Mike Ortega (CA-46), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), and Litesa Wallace (IL-17)
— tune-in to meet these incredible allies and help get them into office!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]RSVP HERE

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: BIG Election Wins | Progressives BEAT Manchin Dems | Summer Lee
Victory in PA-12 | Jamie McLeod-Skinner in OR-5 | Bernie vs. Big Tech |
Cawthorn Out of Office | Roe v Wade Actions | SC Labor Forum | M4A Day of
Action | Larry Cohen: On Democracy | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220523_1_2&recurring=true?t=1013&refcode2=2950_5885482_BleU_0&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]We scored major wins this week with Summer Lee and Jamie McLeod-Skinner
— proving that organizing can outmatch big money. On Tuesday, Jessica
Cisneros takes on anti-choice “Dem” Henry Cuellar, and we need you to
become a RECURRING DONOR to Our Revolution right now to fund our voter
outreach in Texas & beyond!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1014&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1015&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

ORGANIZING TO OUTMATCH BIG MONEY

Our Revolution candidates pulled off pivotal wins on Tuesday because our
movement out-organized and outworked the monied interests. Our
people-powered operation activated voters to elect progressives and
deliver serious blows against the Manchin wing of the Party.

In Oregon, Jamie McLeod-Skinner took a decisive lead over Blue-Dog Kurt
Shrader — nicknamed “Joe Manchin of the House” for famously undercutting
Biden’s agenda and being a key vote against lowering drug prices.

Biden still came out to endorse Shrader against Jamie and Big Pharma
helped him outspend her 10:1. But her progressive platform triumphed, and
Jamie is set to become the first queer representative in the 5th District
come November!

“Kurt Schrader became the national poster boy for learning the hard way,”
Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5552?t=1016&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]The Hill.
“Progressives won some big races despite millions of dollars from
corporate billionaires pouring into Democratic primaries.”

In PA-12, years of grassroots organizing in Pittsburgh helped Summer Lee
overcome $4.5M in spending against her to defeat a union avoidance lawyer
running as a corporate Dem. Before the money poured in, Summer had a
25-point lead — but our movement still pulled out this historic win!

Also in Pennsylvania, John Fetterman won in a landslide against
Establishment darling Conor Lamb. Despite insurance companies funding
bizarre ads against him - and suffering a stroke days before the election
- he won every county in the state to secure its Democratic US Senate
nomination.

In his race, Fetterman explicitly slammed Joe Manchin, who endorsed his
opponent, and came out on top by a margin of 2:1.

Not coincidentally, a new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5553?t=1017&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]NBC News poll shows the same 2:1 margin among
Democratic voters, who want to vote for a candidate “who proposes
larger-scale policies that cost more and might be harder to pass into law,
but could bring major change” vs. incremental change proposals.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1018&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

All told, in recent elections, AIPAC, crypto, and billionaires teamed up
to spend more than $18M helping corporate-aligned Democrats and hindering
working-class candidates.

A flood of corporate cash blanketed the airwaves attacking progressive
women of color running for Congress — resulting in losses for Nida Allam
in NC-4, Erica Smith in NC-1, and Attica Scott in KY-3.

“The same groups have been spending heavily in primaries across the map
this cycle,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5554?t=1019&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Roll
Call. “It’s insane that a couple of issue groups can spend this much money
and have a real impact on races.”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1020&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Our fight is far from finished! The Texas primary is this TUESDAY —
chip in now to help us GROW THE SQUAD by getting more progressives like
Jessica Cisneros over the finish line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1021&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

On Friday, Bernie joined Jessica Cisneros for a rally in San Antonio to
get out the early vote ahead of Tuesday in her runoff against Henry
Cuellar - one of the WORST “Democrats” in Congress.

Cuellar is anti-choice, anti-worker, and brazenly corrupt — a faithful
servant of Big Pharma and Big Oil. While he has the backing of Speaker
Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Jim Clyburn, Jessica has our progressive movement
behind her.

Also this Tuesday, money is pouring in against Jasmine Crockett and
Michele Vallejo who are also running against the establishment in Texas.

Bernie is leading the push to bring an end to this warfare - calling on
DNC Chair Jamie Harrison to take action and ban Super PAC money in

“The goal of this billionaire-funded effort is to crush the candidacies of

Our members and our partners at Free Speech For People are still battling

With AIPAC funding 109 of them in the primaries, we have a lot of

and Andy Biggs — and State Rep. Mark Finchem who joined the mob and

REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE ACTIONS

Our Revolution chapters around the country took part in a National Day of
Action - Bans Off Our Bodies - organized with Planned Parenthood.

Thousands came out in Princeton, NJ, Cleveland, Ohio, Columbia, SC, and
other cities to rally for reproductive justice.
Abortion is healthcare and healthcare is a human right. We cannot let the
far-right authoritarians undo decades of work on this critical issue.

Thanks to our organizers Anna-Marta Visky, Diane Morgan, Lucero Mesa,
Andrea Jimenez, Miguel Ribau, and others - and to Rep. Bonnie Watson
Coleman and everyone who joined these mobilizations to make the voice of
the majority heard!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1031&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

Our Revolution continues to ramp up pressure on President Biden to sign
executive actions strengthening workers’ ability to unionize and punish
union-busters.

“It’s incredibly powerful for the president to visibly show solidarity by
inviting low-wage workers to the Roosevelt Room, that’s awesome,” Our
Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5557?t=1032&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]The Hill. “The
pat on the back, the embrace, is not in itself enough. The president has
to use the full power of the United States government to help these
workers organize.”

Our Revolution also stands with Bernie to call on Biden to help low-wage
federal contract workers losing millions to bureaucratic fumbles amounting
to wage theft, as reported by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5558?t=1033&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]The Washington Post this week.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1034&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Support our work to grow worker power and carry forward the momentum
of the resurgence of the labor movement in America.

Speaking of worker rights, Our Revolution South Carolina convened a Labor
Forum right before helping lead the Reproductive Rights Rally in downtown
Columbia.

South Carolina AFL-CIO President Charles Brave joined Gubernatorial
candidate Senator Mia McLeod and State House Candidate Keith Grey, Sr.

Brave, a longtime labor leader in both the AFL-CIO and the International
Longshoremen's Association, spoke of the “critical role unions played in
creating a middle-class, and the successes of the civil rights and women’s
rights movements.”

Senator McLeod pointed to low wages as one reason for the exodus of young
people from the state, calling “South Carolina a right to work for slave
wages state.” She pledged to “work to strengthen unions and fight to
repeal right-to-work laws.”

Grey decried increasing corporate reliance on “independent contractors”
and called for “adequate funding to enforce labor protection laws on the
books.”

of Action, where supporters showed up to canvass customers at CVS stores
around the country.

We called on CVS Health to stop funding anti-Medicare for All efforts and

CVS is the largest donor to the Partnership for America’s Health Care

nail against M4A and any candidates who support it – including Bernie’s
2020 campaign.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1038&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

FACEBOOK v. BERNIE
TAKING ON BIG TECH FOR DEMOCRACY

Did you see the big story in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5545?t=1041&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]The Daily Beast showing how Facebook
suppressed Bernie during his presidential campaign?

Facebook actually blocked constituents from seeing Bernie’s message and
told him to change his political platform to suit their social media
platform – despicable. A small number of companies have way too much
power, and it’s crippling our Democracy.

That’s why we’re fighting to break up the power of these big tech
monopolies acting as gatekeepers to the public square.

The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act would
enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and app markets. This will
give small businesses a fair shot and empower citizens with more choices
on the platforms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5551?t=1042&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5546?t=1043&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]But we can’t win without your support. If you live in California or
Washington, click HERE to easily call your Senators and tell them to pass
these two important bills!

Not only are we calling for legislative actions, but we’re also calling on
President Biden to use the power of the Justice Department to crack down
on Big Tech.

While Google is pressuring the Biden administration to force DOJ
trust-buster Jonathan Kanter to recuse himself from investigating the
company, Our Revolution joined dozens of progressive and antitrust
advocacy groups to stand up against the tech giant, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5560?t=1044&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Bloomberg
reported.

If the DOJ doesn’t grant Kanter a waiver to scrutinize the company, “it
will not only be bending to these petulant and dangerous tactics but
giving other powerful corporate actors incentive to engage in similar
behavior,” our letter reads.

NEW DOCUMENTARY:
PROGRESSIVES ON A KNIFE’S EDGE

A new documentary by British outlet openDemocracy asks: Can US
Progressives Defeat Big Money and Trumpism? The film - Progressives on a
Knife’s Edge - features deep discussions with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Ro
Khanna, and Jamie Raskin, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5561?t=1046&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Common Dreams reports.

openDemocracy co-founder Anthony Barnett also spoke with Our Revolution
Chair Larry Cohen on the film about our organizing work, the state of the
Democratic Party, and the fight against fascism.

“Democracy itself is actually the leading issue when we do surveys,” Larry
said. “Without a better democracy, we won't have healthcare. We won’t
solve the climate crisis. We won’t deal with racial justice. We won’t deal
with the inequality of wealth.”

“Democrats are totally addicted to big money,” he told Barnett. “Not only
*can* progressives defeat Big Money and Trumpism, they’re the only
Democrats trying. This primary season, we must nominate candidates who
reject corporate money and the rightwing economic policies that go with
it.”

BATTLING THE PARTY FOR DEMOCRACY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5563?t=1052&akid=2950%2E5885482%2EBleU_0 ]Politico reported this week on our fight to make the Massachusetts
Democratic Party more democratic.

“A group of Democratic delegates that includes members of Our Revolution
Massachusetts is accusing the state party of stymying a resolution that
would eliminate a group of unelected members from the roughly 400-person
state committee,” Politico wrote.

Our Revolution organizer and Somerville delegate Rand Wilson is “leading
the charge to change the rules,” said Politico. Rand argues that having a
third of the state committee unelected — makes party leadership
“unaccountable to its grassroots base.”

We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the
resolution for a vote at the convention. If you’re interested in helping
reform the state party contact [ mailto:MassDemsForReform@gmail.com ]HERE.
