In Oregon, Jamie McLeod-Skinner took a decisive lead over Blue-Dog Kurt Shrader — nicknamed “Joe Manchin of the House” for famously undercutting Biden’s agenda and being a key vote against lowering drug prices. Biden still came out to endorse Shrader against Jamie and Big Pharma helped him outspend her 10:1. But her progressive platform triumphed, and Jamie is set to become the first queer representative in the 5th District come November! “Kurt Schrader became the national poster boy for learning the hard way,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Hill. “Progressives won some big races despite millions of dollars from corporate billionaires pouring into Democratic primaries.” In PA-12, years of grassroots organizing in Pittsburgh helped Summer Lee overcome $4.5M in spending against her to defeat a union avoidance lawyer running as a corporate Dem. Before the money poured in, Summer had a 25-point lead — but our movement still pulled out this historic win! Also in Pennsylvania, John Fetterman won in a landslide against Establishment darling Conor Lamb. Despite insurance companies funding bizarre ads against him - and suffering a stroke days before the election - he won every county in the state to secure its Democratic US Senate nomination. In his race, Fetterman explicitly slammed Joe Manchin, who endorsed his opponent, and came out on top by a margin of 2:1. Not coincidentally, a new [ ]NBC News poll shows the same 2:1 margin among Democratic voters, who want to vote for a candidate “who proposes larger-scale policies that cost more and might be harder to pass into law, but could bring major change” vs. incremental change proposals. [ ][IMG] All told, in recent elections, AIPAC, crypto, and billionaires teamed up to spend more than $18M helping corporate-aligned Democrats and hindering working-class candidates. A flood of corporate cash blanketed the airwaves attacking progressive women of color running for Congress — resulting in losses for Nida Allam in NC-4, Erica Smith in NC-1, and Attica Scott in KY-3. “The same groups have been spending heavily in primaries across the map this cycle,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]Roll Call. “It’s insane that a couple of issue groups can spend this much money and have a real impact on races.” [ ]Our fight is far from finished! The Texas primary is this TUESDAY — chip in now to help us GROW THE SQUAD by getting more progressives like Jessica Cisneros over the finish line. [ ][IMG] On Friday, Bernie joined Jessica Cisneros for a rally in San Antonio to get out the early vote ahead of Tuesday in her runoff against Henry Cuellar - one of the WORST “Democrats” in Congress. Cuellar is anti-choice, anti-worker, and brazenly corrupt — a faithful servant of Big Pharma and Big Oil. While he has the backing of Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Jim Clyburn, Jessica has our progressive movement behind her. Also this Tuesday, money is pouring in against Jasmine Crockett and Michele Vallejo who are also running against the establishment in Texas. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We can expect to see more of the “Ohio Model for Purging Progressives” they first honed against Nina Turner in the pivotal races just around the corner, [ ]The American Prospect reports. Bernie is leading the push to bring an end to this warfare - calling on DNC Chair Jamie Harrison to take action and ban Super PAC money in Democratic primaries, [ ]Punchbowl reports. “The goal of this billionaire-funded effort is to crush the candidacies of a number of progressive women of color who are running for Congress,” Bernie said. The corporate establishment sees us growing stronger, and they’re desperate to stop the ascendance of our multiracial, multigenerational movement. [ ]Rush a donation now to help elect powerful progressive candidates and counter the corrosive effect of big money in politics! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CAWTHORN OUSTED FROM OFFICE Our Revolution is thrilled to see insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn ousted from Congress. He conceded his seat in North Carolina’s 11th District on Tuesday to Republican challenger Chuck Edwards. Our members and our partners at Free Speech For People are still battling the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene in the courts, and we need your support more than ever to uphold the Constitution which prohibits insurrectionists from re-election. With AIPAC funding 109 of them in the primaries, we have a lot of important work in front of us. We’re up against Doug Mastriano and Scott Perry in Pennsylvania, and in Arizona, we’re taking on US Reps. Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs — and State Rep. Mark Finchem who joined the mob and breached the Capitol on January 6th! TAKE ACTION: [ ]Sign our petition to your state elections official demanding they uphold the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE ACTIONS Our Revolution chapters around the country took part in a National Day of Action - Bans Off Our Bodies - organized with Planned Parenthood. Thousands came out in Princeton, NJ, Cleveland, Ohio, Columbia, SC, and other cities to rally for reproductive justice. Abortion is healthcare and healthcare is a human right. We cannot let the far-right authoritarians undo decades of work on this critical issue. Thanks to our organizers Anna-Marta Visky, Diane Morgan, Lucero Mesa, Andrea Jimenez, Miguel Ribau, and others - and to Rep. Bonnie Watson Coleman and everyone who joined these mobilizations to make the voice of the majority heard! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution continues to ramp up pressure on President Biden to sign executive actions strengthening workers’ ability to unionize and punish union-busters. “It’s incredibly powerful for the president to visibly show solidarity by inviting low-wage workers to the Roosevelt Room, that’s awesome,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Hill. “The pat on the back, the embrace, is not in itself enough. The president has to use the full power of the United States government to help these workers organize.” Our Revolution also stands with Bernie to call on Biden to help low-wage federal contract workers losing millions to bureaucratic fumbles amounting to wage theft, as reported by [ ]The Washington Post this week. [ ]Support our work to grow worker power and carry forward the momentum of the resurgence of the labor movement in America. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Speaking of worker rights, Our Revolution South Carolina convened a Labor Forum right before helping lead the Reproductive Rights Rally in downtown Columbia. South Carolina AFL-CIO President Charles Brave joined Gubernatorial candidate Senator Mia McLeod and State House Candidate Keith Grey, Sr. Brave, a longtime labor leader in both the AFL-CIO and the International Longshoremen's Association, spoke of the “critical role unions played in creating a middle-class, and the successes of the civil rights and women’s rights movements.” Senator McLeod pointed to low wages as one reason for the exodus of young people from the state, calling “South Carolina a right to work for slave wages state.” She pledged to “work to strengthen unions and fight to repeal right-to-work laws.” Grey decried increasing corporate reliance on “independent contractors” and called for “adequate funding to enforce labor protection laws on the books.” [ ]WATCH THE LABOR FORUM HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] CALLING OUT CVS’ ANTI-M4A SPENDING Last week, Our Revolution joined National Nurses United for a National Day of Action, where supporters showed up to canvass customers at CVS stores around the country. We called on CVS Health to stop funding anti-Medicare for All efforts and worked to raise awareness with customers of the company’s nefarious actions. CVS is the largest donor to the Partnership for America’s Health Care Future, donating $5M to the dark money lobbying group fighting tooth and nail against M4A and any candidates who support it – including Bernie’s 2020 campaign. [ ][IMG] We are undeterred! Also last week, Our Revolution members rallied at the Capitol Thursday with Bernie, who as Budget Committee Chairman held the first-ever Senate hearing on Medicare for All and reintroduced the bill! [ ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution today to power the next phase of our fight for Medicare for All. We are moving the ball forward! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] FACEBOOK v. BERNIE TAKING ON BIG TECH FOR DEMOCRACY Did you see the big story in [ ]The Daily Beast showing how Facebook suppressed Bernie during his presidential campaign? Facebook actually blocked constituents from seeing Bernie’s message and told him to change his political platform to suit their social media platform – despicable. A small number of companies have way too much power, and it’s crippling our Democracy. That’s why we’re fighting to break up the power of these big tech monopolies acting as gatekeepers to the public square. The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and app markets. This will give small businesses a fair shot and empower citizens with more choices on the platforms. [ ][IMG] [ ]But we can’t win without your support. If you live in California or Washington, click HERE to easily call your Senators and tell them to pass these two important bills! Not only are we calling for legislative actions, but we’re also calling on President Biden to use the power of the Justice Department to crack down on Big Tech. While Google is pressuring the Biden administration to force DOJ trust-buster Jonathan Kanter to recuse himself from investigating the company, Our Revolution joined dozens of progressive and antitrust advocacy groups to stand up against the tech giant, [ ]Bloomberg reported. If the DOJ doesn’t grant Kanter a waiver to scrutinize the company, “it will not only be bending to these petulant and dangerous tactics but giving other powerful corporate actors incentive to engage in similar behavior,” our letter reads. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW DOCUMENTARY: PROGRESSIVES ON A KNIFE’S EDGE A new documentary by British outlet openDemocracy asks: Can US Progressives Defeat Big Money and Trumpism? The film - Progressives on a Knife’s Edge - features deep discussions with US Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna, and Jamie Raskin, [ ]Common Dreams reports. openDemocracy co-founder Anthony Barnett also spoke with Our Revolution Chair Larry Cohen on the film about our organizing work, the state of the Democratic Party, and the fight against fascism. “Democracy itself is actually the leading issue when we do surveys,” Larry said. “Without a better democracy, we won't have healthcare. We won’t solve the climate crisis. We won’t deal with racial justice. We won’t deal with the inequality of wealth.” “Democrats are totally addicted to big money,” he told Barnett. “Not only can progressives defeat Big Money and Trumpism, they’re the only Democrats trying. This primary season, we must nominate candidates who reject corporate money and the rightwing economic policies that go with it.” [ ]WATCH THE DOCUMENTARY HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] 2022 MEMBERSHIP REWARDS! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack, and at $15, you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders, we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world, but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BATTLING THE PARTY FOR DEMOCRACY [ ]Politico reported this week on our fight to make the Massachusetts Democratic Party more democratic. “A group of Democratic delegates that includes members of Our Revolution Massachusetts is accusing the state party of stymying a resolution that would eliminate a group of unelected members from the roughly 400-person state committee,” Politico wrote. Our Revolution organizer and Somerville delegate Rand Wilson is “leading the charge to change the rules,” said Politico. Rand argues that having a third of the state committee unelected — makes party leadership “unaccountable to its grassroots base.” We are working to get 500 delegate signatures by May 21 to bring the resolution for a vote at the convention. If you’re interested in helping reform the state party contact [ mailto:MassDemsForReform@gmail.com ]HERE. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join us Monday, May 23rd, at 8:30p ET/7:30 CT for our National ‘Organize to Win’ Call with Our Revolution Board Member and Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison on the state of the progressive fight in 2022! Congressional races are heating up, and we’ll be strategizing directly with Mike Ortega (CA-46), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), and Litesa Wallace (IL-17) — tune-in to meet these incredible allies and help get them into office! [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As we showed this week with the victories of Summer Lee and Jamie McLeod-Skinner, we can overcome the force of big money by reaching voters directly. We have a shot to elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems in these pivotal primaries. On Tuesday, Jessica Cisneros goes up against one of the worst — Henry Cuellar — and we can defeat him if we continue to rise up as a unified front and outmatch corporate power. Help us make calls any day of the week for Our Revolution partners like Alexi Giannoulias for Illinois Secretary of State, and congressional candidates Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Amy Vilela (NV-1), and DC Council candidates Erin Palmer and Zack Parker. [ ]SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW YORK TOWN HALL Get ready for Our Revolution’s New York Town Hall this Monday, May 23rd, from 7 to 8 pm ET! We have amazing progressive candidates taking on the corporate opposition, and they need OUR help to win their primary races. We'll be joined by Jumaane Williams and Ana Maria Archila, candidates for Governor and Lt. Governor, as well as two of our most inspiring congressional candidates, Melanie D’Arrigo and Brittany Ramos DeBarros, and others! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This week, we’re ramping up calls to elect Amy Vilela to Congress. She is a progressive champion and a powerful leader in the fight for Medicare for All. [ ]We’ll be calling thousands of voters in Nevada CD-1 which includes Las Vegas - SIGN-UP HERE to make calls for Amy! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Help us defend democracy by electing progressive Secretary of State candidate Alexi Giannoulias in Illinois! [ ]MAKE A DIFFERENCE - SIGN UP TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to elect progressive Democrat and Our Revolution member David Segal to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Rhode Island’s First Congressional District, which includes much of the city of Providence. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to re-elect progressive Democrats and Our Revolution endorsed Rep. Andy Levin to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in Michigan’s 11th congressional district, which includes Detroit area communities such as Bloomfield and Pontiac. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up for phone banking as we organize to elect progressive Democrat and Our Revolution member and endorsed candidate Brittany Ramos DeBarros to Congress. We will be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in this Staten Island-based Congressional District. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] You can help ramp up direct voter outreach for all of our progressive candidates taking on the establishment in these pivotal primaries happening now! [ ]JOIN THE PHONEBANK FORCE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month, you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, get a sticker 6-pack, and at $15, get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Lombardo for Governor

In just 5 days - after months of build up in the most important midterm election in our state’s history...

| Peter,
In just 5 days - after months of build up in the most important midterm election in our state's history - Nevadans are finally going to be headed to the ballot box to cast their votes.
Early primary voting starts THIS SATURDAY. And needless to say, it's a CRITICAL week for our campaign to Keep Nevada Safe.
We already know that Steve Sisolak's friends in D.C. have been spending millions of dollars on attack ads against Sheriff Joe because they're scared to face him in the General Election. National, powerful, out-of-state Democrats are trying to slow our momentum by flat-out LYING about Joe's record!
But that's not all - we also know that other keyboard cowboys are trying to knock Sheriff Joe by talking tough on social media, when NONE of them can match his real-world leadership of keeping our state safe from violent criminals.
The one thing we can count on to overcome these politicians, though - and the one thing that they don't have - is YOU.
Supporters like you are the essential part of this conservative movement in Nevada that has already helped a proven law enforcement leader skyrocket in the polls, garner national attention, and even secure the endorsement of President Trump.
[By keeping up that support during this big week, we can keep our momentum going during the most important week for our campaign yet. Can you chip in $50, $10, or any other amount right now so we can get a much-needed boost before Nevadans start to cast their votes? >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QR4_MHVNT-Vo1YzOZfRvt0G-8tOvz5RdQeM-rLV0K-PitvvlvPGfMukQQPYFpNpkTYjSUC2hqVwPWdaOGNqDD51vdv-SRJBix6O5dViMjalMs27dbOObDIfO149qhiOEUQoTZzG2w6O-zIFtG_dbLVWF5usnx4ohj3YFe-YDk-5lj1cdPBuJu-4SOZc85QPy7fSPh8NZShDkGhuxLGJi8sBqz5ttYlAFcYMDP8mJzMeo7ZrWG3Y8Ng==&c=RNUWZOHNSbXZB8owxPR5XMTNNJ7x7b3FwdhvLDGpr_gkSqb6WC959w==&ch=GfbvWAgrYvgT5trJahAKw6F3rKT-V5jD8Vlej8EpEGZbz94o-j9hbA==)

| By lending your support, you are helping build the infrastructure for a Sheriff Joe Lombardo victory even when national Democrats use their campaign warchest to try to take him out.
We're hoping for at least 100 online donations to come in today, too - so if you can help out, and want to make a difference in restoring law and order, fixing our education system, and building a strong economy for Nevada, just click the link below:
[Build Momentum. Be 1 of 100 Donors We Need. Click Here ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QR4_MHVNT-Vo1YzOZfRvt0G-8tOvz5RdQeM-rLV0K-PitvvlvPGfMukQQPYFpNpkTYjSUC2hqVwPWdaOGNqDD51vdv-SRJBix6O5dViMjalMs27dbOObDIfO149qhiOEUQoTZzG2w6O-zIFtG_dbLVWF5usnx4ohj3YFe-YDk-5lj1cdPBuJu-4SOZc85QPy7fSPh8NZShDkGhuxLGJi8sBqz5ttYlAFcYMDP8mJzMeo7ZrWG3Y8Ng==&c=RNUWZOHNSbXZB8owxPR5XMTNNJ7x7b3FwdhvLDGpr_gkSqb6WC959w==&ch=GfbvWAgrYvgT5trJahAKw6F3rKT-V5jD8Vlej8EpEGZbz94o-j9hbA==)
Thank you for everything you do, Lombardo for Governor

clean_body: In just 5 days - after months of build up in the most important midterm election in our state’s history... | | | | | | | | | == | Peter, In just 5 days - after months of build up in the most important midterm election in our state's history - Nevadans are finally going to be headed to the ballot box to cast their votes. Early primary voting starts THIS SATURDAY. And needless to say, it's a CRITICAL week for our campaign to Keep Nevada Safe. We already know that Steve Sisolak's friends in D.C. have been spending millions of dollars on attack ads against Sheriff Joe because they're scared to face him in the General Election. National, powerful, out-of-state Democrats are trying to slow our momentum by flat-out LYING about Joe's record! But that's not all - we also know that other keyboard cowboys are trying to knock Sheriff Joe by talking tough on social media, when NONE of them can match his real-world leadership of keeping our state safe from violent criminals. The one thing we can count on to overcome these politicians, though - and the one thing that they don't have - is YOU. Supporters like you are the essential part of this conservative movement in Nevada that has already helped a proven law enforcement leader skyrocket in the polls, garner national attention, and even secure the endorsement of President Trump. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | By lending your support, you are helping build the infrastructure for a Sheriff Joe Lombardo victory even when national Democrats use their campaign warchest to try to take him out. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Derek Since Maggie Hassan has still yet to stand up to her party bosses on behalf of Granite Staters - instead choosing to support radical legislation that we didn’t ask for or vote for like limitless abortions \- we wanted to make sure you knew there was something you can do about it... Derek, when there are millions of dollars from Hollywood being funneled into the campaign coffers of this Ivy League Washington politician, we need to have a resource at our disposal to push back. That’s what this fund is for \- every dollar raised goes towards replacing the D.C. Way of Hassan (high taxes, Open Borders, late-term abortion) with the New Hampshire values of Chuck Morse (prosperity, individual responsibility, freedom, the American Dream). So whether you chipped in earlier or whether this would be your first contribution to the fund, ** | | | | | | | Thank you for standing up for the 603! -Team Morse | | | \---------Forwarded Message------- From:Stop Maggie Hassan Fund Date: Fri, May 13, 2022 at 1:00 PM Subject: Retire Hassan. Flip the Senate Red! | | | Derek With over five years on the job, New Hampshire Democrat Senator Maggie Hassan had her chance to pass policies that would help the lives of everyday Americans. Instead, she has made lives WORSE by bringing chaos in the form of reckless spending, Open Borders, and failed foreign policy... She’s towing the party line even when it jeopardizes our safety and prosperity! | | | | | | | But here’s the thing: this vulnerable Dem is still getting hundreds of thousands of dollars in support from liberal mega-donors in California. So if we’re going to STOP Maggie Hassan in a critical election year, and end the days of her serving Hollywood and D.C. instead of the Granite Staters she represents, it’s going to take a massive effort... That’s where this fund comes in: every dollar raised in this** going to be maximized to unseat this left-wing Biden lackey. We can get proven New Hampshire leader Chuck Morse elected instead, and even f lip the Senate REDin the process! All of that is possible if supporters like you join the effort and make this fund as impactful as can be. This is one of the most closely watched Senate races in the entire country, which is why we don’t have time to wait till closer to November... We need to be building the infrastructure for a victory RIGHT NOW. Can you help? **** | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | For New Hampshire and America, Stop Maggie Hassan Fund (via Morse for Senate) | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse PO Box 106, North Salem NH 03073 United States

name: John (sent from my iPhone)
subject: back home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
hi Derek it's John
Guess what?
i’m officially back home in braddock with our whole crew + Artie + Levi 🥰
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-5955&refcode2=5955_434096_o11fYn&akid=5955%2E434096%2Eo11fYn)
i’m feeling great Derek. gotta take a little more time to rest + recover (and annoy gisele and the kids) - but i can’t wait to see yinz guys soon.
(also, sorry, i’m typing this on my iPhone while being forced to watch 90 Day Fiance, so there might be some typos 🙄😂)
Now... where even to start with the thank yous??
i want to thank the *amazing* staff at Lancaster GeneraHospital for taking such good care of me start to finish.
And honestly, i don’t even have the words to thank gisele + tell her how proud i am of her. she’s my best friend + everyone’s favorite for a reason...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-5955&refcode2=5955_434096_o11fYn&akid=5955%2E434096%2Eo11fYn)
...so i took her for an impromptu date in Somerset on our way home
and last but not least i want to thank yinz for everything. seriously. your support means everything to me + my family.
**[real quick, before i sign off, i gotta ask - we’re still in the first week of this general election fight, and the amount we’re able to raise at the start is going to shape our entire campaign for US Senate. do you think you could chip in $5 or more today? anything you can give, i’d be so grateful for.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220523-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220523-5955&refcode2=5955_434096_o11fYn&akid=5955%2E434096%2Eo11fYn)**
Here’s that link one more time, Derek: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220523-2?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-5955&refcode2=5955_434096_o11fYn&akid=5955%2E434096%2Eo11fYn)**
well, Derek. levi + artie are demanding cheese so duty calls. i dont think there’s anything else left to say for now except: thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! ❤️❤️❤️
—John
Sent from my iPhone

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: RE: Listen to people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Join us in West Bend to have your voice heard | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb2b025ab00d/i-am-running-for-congress-8989822?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hey there!

We wanted to be sure you saw Mike's invitation below for the listening session we're hosting at **West Bend Community Memorial Library tomorrow, May 24th at 6:30PM. **

Mike is committed to serving _all of his future constituents_ , and wants to hear from you. Don't miss out on this opportunity to let Mike know what you expect out of your next Congressman.

See you tomorrow!
Team Van Someren
---
|
---
| Neighbors:

It’s pretty clear that our member of Congress, Scott Fitzgerald, only listens to special interests and extremists.

Most of us agree on most things, but Scott’s party refuses to act. Whether it’s inflation, crime, healthcare, or climate change, Scott just votes no and points the finger.

I want to be a different kind of Congressman, who listens to concerns of families, especially those worried about losing their job or finding baby formula.

**Join me for a listening session in West Bend so I can hear about the challenges your family is facing. **
---
|
---
| **Tuesday, May 24th | 6:30 - 8:00PM **
West Bend Community Memorial Library
630 Poplar St
West Bend, WI 53095
**I’m running for Congress to bring common-sense leadership to Washington.** We need to help regular folks who are putting in an honest day’s work to get ahead, while ensuring that programs are available for those that need help to get back on their feet.

We need to focus on rebuilding the American middle class, so everyone gets a fair shake. All of us putting in our hours deserve to own a home, raise our families, meet basic expenses, and save for a rainy day.

**Scott Fitzgerald refuses to work for the middle class.** YOU deserve better.

**Join me in West Bend, at the library on Poplar Street, at 6:30 p.m. on Tuesday, May 24.**

See you there!
Mike
---
| | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
---

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Election Night Watch Party
Friends,
Election Day is tomorrow, and your support has been monumental in getting us to this point! Tomorrow night after the polls close, we're celebrating because we couldn't have made it this far without you! Please join Jane and the team tomorrow evening, May 24th for an Election Night Watch Party .
Watch Party [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/WATCH%20PARTY.png]
REMINDER: If you have not voted, PLEASE make your plan today. Voting centers will be open from 7am to 7pm. You can vote at any voting center in your county of residence. If you're an eligible voter and in line by 7pm it is your right to vote.

body:
Is Right Around The Corner!!! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/05ea4ad68f28/the-republican-primary?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=8409426cff&e=102b599530)
---
| | Dear Patriots,

We are in the fourth quarter of the 2022 Republican Primary Election on June 7th.
[Let’s keep this momentum going we’ve been on a roll! I’ll need your help to beat MLG! ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=78d82fb5d7&e=102b599530)
You have a very important decision to make in the coming weeks. This decision will dictate the manner in which our state will be led and the residual effects that we will have to face, based on that decision.

At the end of the day, I am the only candidate who can defeat MLG. Everyone knows that because the political insider candidates have too much baggage and have gone negative on each other and now they are unelectable.

Mark Ronchetti lost to Ben Ray Lujan for U.S. Senate in 2020 by almost 60,000 votes. Senator Ben Ray Lujan was a much weaker candidate than our current Governor and if we nominate the weather man, history will repeat itself and a Lujan will reign victorious once more.

Rebecca Dow has even more baggage than a 30-year career politician in Washington D.C. Once MLG grabs this baggage she will exploit it to a point that is unimaginable, ultimately, making her unelectable.

Both of these candidates can NOT defeat our current Governor, I can.

A vote for Ronchetti or Dow on June 7 is a vote for a second Michelle Lujan Grisham term.

With our second commercial soon being released, and the potential of a third one in the pipelines, I humbly request the following from you:

\- Please share this email with 5 of your friends and family members, who believe as you and I believe. Please ask them to do the same.

\- Copy and paste this email and send my message via text (or call) to 3 of your friends and family members who may not use their email frequently. Please ask them to do the same.

\- Finally, I ask that you please donate at [BlockForNewMexico.com](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=a0b4f8f498&e=102b599530), as the vast majority of funds received will be going to our final commercial(s), in order to purchase additional air time, so that we can spread our message of hope and freedom to all New Mexicans.
---

clean_body: Is Right Around The Corner!!! | | | | | | | Dear Patriots, We are in the fourth quarter of the 2022 Republican Primary Election on June 7th. You have a very important decision to make in the coming weeks. This decision will dictate the manner in which our state will be led and the residual effects that we will have to face, based on that decision. At the end of the day, I am the only candidate who can defeat MLG. Everyone knows that because the political insider candidates have too much baggage and have gone negative on each other and now they are unelectable. Mark Ronchetti lost to Ben Ray Lujan for U.S. Senate in 2020 by almost 60,000 votes. Senator Ben Ray Lujan was a much weaker candidate than our current Governor and if we nominate the weather man, history will repeat itself and a Lujan will reign victorious once more. Rebecca Dow has even more baggage than a 30-year career politician in Washington D.C. Once MLG grabs this baggage she will exploit it to a point that is unimaginable, ultimately, making her unelectable. Both of these candidates can NOT defeat our current Governor, I can. A vote for Ronchetti or Dow on June 7 is a vote for a second Michelle Lujan Grisham term. With our second commercial soon being released, and the potential of a third one in the pipelines, I humbly request the following from you: \- Please share this email with 5 of your friends and family members, who believe as you and I believe. Please ask them to do the same. \- Copy and paste this email and send my message via text (or call) to 3 of your friends and family members who may not use their email frequently. Please ask them to do the same. \- Finally, I ask that you please donate at , as the vast majority of funds received will be going to our final commercial(s), in order to purchase additional air time, so that we can spread our message of hope and freedom to all New Mexicans. | "DONATE $5 »" | "DONATE $15 »" | "DONATE $25 »" | "DONATE $50 »" | "DONATE $100 »" | "Request Absentee Ballot " | "Volunteer With Us!" | Sincerely, Jay Block Candidate for Governor Lt Col (Ret) USAF | Jay Block is a retired member of the Air Force. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: This is a war on the poor,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**I’m running for Congress to end America’s war on the poor. Can you help send me to Congress to do that?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45669307/346989737/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjc4ZGRmNS0wNGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYIYwNZ7SDO1NC4Bia1xdNFg5mzIrnyMYYYrhWDaagA=) When working a full-time minimum wage job can’t pay rent, let alone food or gas, that’s a war on the poor. When over half a million Americans are homeless, that’s a war on the poor. When 1 in 5 kids go to bed hungry in the richest country on Earth, that’s a war on the poor. Almost half of the US is poor or low-income. I’m the only candidate in my race for Congress who supports policies to change that like Medicare for All, a jobs guarantee, a $30 minimum wage, and Housing for All. [**Unlike my Chevron Democrat opponent, I don’t take ANY corporate money, so I need your help to win. Please chip in whatever you can afford right here, so I can win this race and fight for the 99%, not the billionaires. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45669308/346989738/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjc4ZGRmNS0wNGRiLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYIYwNZ7SDO1NC4Bia1xdNFg5mzIrnyMYYYrhWDaagA=) clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Fellow American, I'm sending you a quick update on Herschel Walker's race. Sen. Raphael Warnock is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in November. Electing Herschel Walker is key to taking back the Senate and Republicans CAN do this in November. But, this will be a tough and expensive race. Herschel's primary election is just 1 day away. Once Herschel wins his primary, he will face one of the toughest general elections in the country. Liberal Sen. Warnock is raising record-breaking amounts of money. In the first three months of the year, he raised $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE! My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Re: MSNBC video

body:
Sharing my latest interview on MSNBC. You can watch the video right here... Ron Johnson voted against our reproductive rights. This November, we're going to vote him out of office for good. In fact, I'm more determined than ever to defeat him. I even went on MSNBC to talk about the importance of our Senate race in Wisconsin. If Democrats flip this seat, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand our majority — and one more vote would help us end the filibuster and protect reproductive freedom across this country. **[If you haven't seen my MSNBC interview, click here to watch:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45665104/346948736/144159666?refcode=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFiYmE5MC1lNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZl13dikxP-Kp2AeSUEdY_WisJ-6ZcJRbSe9DTAnJaA=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45665105/346948737/144159666?refcode=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFiYmE5MC1lNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZl13dikxP-Kp2AeSUEdY_WisJ-6ZcJRbSe9DTAnJaA=)

As long as we’re represented by Ron Johnson, who believes a patient’s room should include their doctor and the entire U.S. government, people won’t get the health care they need. That’s why it’s so important that we elect a Senator who won't sit by and allow our reproductive rights to be ripped away.

**I’m ready to be that Senator** — and as the only woman in this race, I have been loud, clear, and unwavering about my commitment to protecting our reproductive freedom. I’m not giving up on this fight, and I hope you won’t either.

**[Our race in Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and the stakes have never been higher. Please watch my latest MSNBC interview and consider chipping in to help us defeat Ron Johnson this November:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45665106/346948738/144159666?refcode=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220523_msnbc_evid_gq_act_rs_ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFiYmE5MC1lNWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZl13dikxP-Kp2AeSUEdY_WisJ-6ZcJRbSe9DTAnJaA=)**

**Did you see the recent news?**

On May 18th, the VAGOP held a candidate forum and straw poll for VA-07. Below are the results.. and the winner is abundantly clear.
[**“If the Republican Primary were held today, based on today’s forum, who would you vote for to take on Abigail Spanberger in the November election?”**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=6dd95c855f6c4962b67c6f8636053146&_e=UWCrI8Gog0ZZCXFn3MX4uO_M4pnOdOO469o0i7LvljiLRwGgp0dRzbRuJdAgD2xRp6_K3uWCzQMF0GU3TFOZ_OtWKgJzDohWN1JCk7qM2NGTT7HOCiUAvmCaWohU-dLJZ2jt0rnSdtfXRUT_AY5gjmlQSBgorxtN5DSHz2bB-uXh6z6WEKvnTLmEbqMWUxNRiOrvvR85EXREDOzrV446llD140p1mnxMi8zA2Cr7e7SxZAkV232Ycnk4S2snquzg7_hHQz-c8pire0_4JeC7wObVmuZYjVghys3d2Wp72lqv-_q7Vk2TdHOq928D36ATNecP2Q_3mpiAAZJ7cekhANYTMpc_4Lsyc1eyJIl_l25gFJin9srkwXUu41KaWIVlStMmcweSUQts7Ah6qsnj1Mu3zH0HERINOEP6el6lA3Qs-SMByYomO-uJWj1ETd2MSAe_0lrKMJCbOE9KdfRl7gKRHd4nxE0h3xGcfT1dbak%3D) **Yesli Vega 56%**
Bryce Reeves 18%
Gina Carcia 10%
Crystal Vanuch 9%
Derrick Anderson 6%
David Ross 1%
**That’s right - Yesli Vega netted 56% in the straw poll after the forum.**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We’re in the homestretch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Election Day is two weeks from tomorrow — not to mention early voting locations are open now and mail-in ballots are already being delivered — and I need your help in this final get-out-the-vote push.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=279%2E5257348%2EAnQAVB)
Derek, I’ll keep this short and sweet.
We’re in the homestretch of the California jungle primary where I’m facing 8 opponents in a brand new district.
Running in a new district means tens of thousands of new voters who have never seen my name on a ballot are seeing it. Right now. Election Day is two weeks from tomorrow — not to mention early voting locations are _open now_ and mail-in ballots are _already being delivered_ — and I need your help in this final get-out-the-vote push.
My team is busy doing grassroots campaigning at homes and public places, running digital ads, and calling folks living in our new district. Can you pitch in to fund our efforts before moving on with your Monday? Use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&refcode2=279_5257348_AnQAVB&akid=279%2E5257348%2EAnQAVB)**
There’s still so much work to do in Washington to help folks, protect our planet, and defend our democracy, so sincerely, thank you for supporting our campaign.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=279%2E5257348%2EAnQAVB) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=279%2E5257348%2EAnQAVB)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

| | | [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=fad1dba178e747d8bd7fcdd57c9941c9&_e=f4h9ZWpvJCA7eRGro8iUtpkLeE_dTth9QYq7evIo8gZJwnUaYu4vl07IIEM3kzjMKuQJdfyGjO17Jji4mKAmOQug0S-tQ-znl5kqhypUquV_DvcGOlzsCbicPA3rVODTZ7D_iRu-4kU-_7vg6Jr3mgh8Jnr4WSdflFFsm8D5DD24Ql98EGjcKndxPDinGcZJChwsP5E0Y2ff_0iI5xJQyjOrwOvytLKwSw5N6Q48AWybvXkNhwMvMkswRw6HesI3qYyuHQNF1Q-8ld-3lc56p-UY-kGQSRBGg-GVHQlqns_TIR5pHmHHbFFt2G-mIe4oNSoidIWQSuldn-LbHx7_fyspu-4spa5VUaNqTDn_k5a-DCIGdZTmUfgbm6pVDF3fp6Ubsap9tNVEAbUTAvNiWqOyWpLHLKTK16ClkPwgKX8%3D)

Joe Biden has had a _ **record-breaking**_** presidency**. After becoming the oldest but certainly NOT the wisest president to serve, sleepy Joe set two more records.

He shaped one of the** WORST economies** of modern time and allowed **gas to hit its highest price EVER**.

After crippling our economy, Joe still had time to set another all-time record of allowing over **200,000 illegal immigrants into America in one month**.

**This is all a part of the Left’s plan to CREATE INSTABILITY and SEIZE CONTROL.**

The Left is ready for a** socialist takeover of America**, and they’re making it happen by winning election by-election.

**The only thing that stands between a hostile socialist takeover and our freedom is YOU**. Now more than ever, the Mississippi GOP needs YOUR help to double down on our fight against the socialist Left.

body:
This is the year we get our Colorado back!

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=060e0d7afd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_23_05_25&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-060e0d7afd-584862049

** Let's select a candidate to face Polis who is
------------------------------------------------------------

** ONE OF US FOR ALL OF US!
------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Colorado Voter,

This weekend marked a special moment in our campaign, where I was able to clearly separate myself from my opponent in the primary this June.

This weekend, I talked about solutions and ideas that can help us achieve the Colorado Dream together. Where we are all protected. Where we all have true representation. Where we can afford to live, work, and enjoy our lives as members of a greater Colorado community.

** Join this movement to put People Over Politics and make our Colorado, safe and secure, for ourselves and our children.
------------------------------------------------------------

Greg Lopez

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: TOMORROW.
body:
Will you help us win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b7eb87146ef8/tomorrow?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

As we approach tomorrow's Election Day in Georgia, voters are reminded everywhere they look of the Democrats' failed policies. Whether it is soaring inflation, record-high gas prices, or supply chain shortages on grocery store shelves, every American feels the pain of the Biden administration's nonexistent leadership. That is why it's more critical than ever that we elect a candidate who has what it takes to defeat Raphael Warnock in November.

[I believe I am that candidate, but we need your help. Will you help us win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica?](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=3dc7b5ed58&e=7bbb93570f)

Georgians deserve leaders who listen to their concerns, answer the tough questions, and stand up for the values that matter to voters. I've been working hard on the campaign trail to earn voters' trust, and now I'm ready to put in the work required of a United States Senator.

[I'm asking you to please consider supporting our campaign with a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or any amount you can do to help us fund our Election Day Get-Out-The-Vote efforts. ](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=c2de98b276&e=7bbb93570f)

Together we can #WinforAmerica and take back the U.S. Senate.

Respectfully,

---

name: Charles Booker HQ
subject: Our campaign is gaining serious momentum. 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Did you see our email last week,
Peter?

Long story short: Our movement is already making history in a BIG way.

From Charles officially becoming the first Black candidate in Kentucky to
represent a major party for Senate, to receiving endorsements from iconic
progressive leaders like Bernie Sanders — our campaign is gaining serious
momentum. 🔥

That’s why we’re reaching out again to make sure you have a chance to add
your name as a founding donor of our campaign and be a part of the
historic work we’re doing to turn Kentucky blue.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amp;amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ]Will you chip in $5 right now to become a founding donor
of our campaign? Every dollar you give helps us train more volunteers,
mobilize more organizers, and reach more voters throughout Kentucky so we
can replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amp;amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ][IMG]

We’ll remember you as one of our earliest supporters in this fight to
replace Rand Paul and elect a leader who’s ready to advocate for the bold,
progressive solutions that matter most to working families.

It’s going to be an uphill battle, but if enough people chip in now to
help build our campaign, we’ll have the power to transform our Senate.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amp;amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ]If you donate any amount today we’ll make sure to add your name as a
founding member of this movement.

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

P.S. In case you missed our email last week, we’re attaching it below so
you can catch up on all of the exciting news for our campaign!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

from: CharlesBooker.org <info@e.charlesbooker.org>
date: May 20, 2022, 12:53 PM
subject: Let’s keep this momentum up

It’s been a big week for us,
Peter.

FIRST: Charles won his primary and was elected as the official Democratic
Senate nominee. He became the first Black person in the history of
Kentucky to represent a major party for Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ][IMG]

THEN: Progressive leaders like Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren
celebrated this victory. They know if we want to deliver meaningful change
to working families across the country – Charles is the leader we need in
the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ][IMG]

SO NOW: We’re working to make sure this momentum continues to grow every
day until Election day. If this energy keeps going, we have the grassroots
power to send Charles to the Senate. 🔥

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ]Will you chip in $5 right now and we’ll put your name
down as a #FoundingDonor of our people-powered campaign? We’re relying on
grassroots donations to make sure we have the power this election to
replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ]Chip in $5 →

The truth is a lot of people don’t think that change in Kentucky is
possible.

But this week has been proof that the naysayers are wrong: Kentuckians are
hungry for change. The people chose Charles as the Democratic nominee and
folks are rising up to make sure we end this failed chapter of leadership
under Rand Paul.

We’ve begun the hard work of building a campaign that will take back the
people’s seat back from Rand Paul. We’re building coalitions in every
corner of our commonwealth. We’re talking with and listening to our
neighbors. And we’re powering this work from everyday folks like
you, Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220523-2?refcode=em20220523-1963&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC ]It’s not too late to become a Founding Donor of our campaign. Please
chip in any amount you can afford, and you’ll be counted as one of the
earliest supporters of our movement.

Let’s get to work,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220523-1963-footer&t=1027&refcode2=1963_346206_8B83EC&akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1963%2E346206%2E8B83EC

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

**Our campaign is honored to announce that we’ve received the endorsement of former Seventh District Congressman and tea party hero, Congressman Dave Brat.** Congressman Brat formerly represented the Seventh District and was a true leader in the fight for the limited government, constitutionally conservative principles many Republican espouse, but don’t often follow through on. [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrZCvp8T0-iLtTbW0ylSO8_kQfrLCiMA5JI3gWAY942ckJFejBqDVDZyyHVF1IkkznsHv5onUBIcyzCDKCc78Ddc7UFC4f_NsO0KrYdGku7cI5XLW9AlXwYxVM1OGbKI4KyUw4wEikbrXRHpXt86cZd1qyYbFMwHxykhac9wvCB0lmHaZQ6zW0LcPow2tUBqFXCcz8ihrtiPX4_-BW9fjfh5) **“Yesli Vega is the conservative fighter we need to defeat Abigail Spanberger and take back the 7th District. Her plan and promises to stop the out-of-control spending madness and elitist globalism, secure our southern border, and to fight for the Judeo-Christian values our Country was founded upon is a breath of fresh air and exactly what's needed in Washington today. She has my full support and I urge all liberty loving conservatives to cast their vote for her on June 21st!” **– Dave Brat, former Congressman, Virginia's 7th Congressional District.

**[Click here for the full release.](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bA3uspphNIGG1yANOhc9EXOLj-U2oydZ30TkPQGB0YEeQB3h0gHFrQFMu6p7wNbLuvv3qWPJ0WhBOEjTshlkNeyRzSDPo7UXP9laIQwcSFRL7OyfUkZVsZlvgTzO6govT_eHjmIEHe9IK92jQ5fgsDvYhrSAkC8_z33PvwZ8shrShw9x4sM88FoZ8DlL7fpl1bP503S6q6N4KDnFGU3ZL50hpvfbxlMWRF3E4wP2ai0RDrPeAMYzENaULe6WQAXMm_aSGjA-XD9kxr5ROrnOntoARaCIpfDfp2QPoGum4YRw-ZJzDKQhwSD5VumLkS-U9SnqjrRUpNZeYD3GOYPQeYE%3D) ** Like Congressman Brat, I will make the difficult choices necessary to preserve our republic and get us back to a sound fiscal and financial footing, fight to secure our border, and restore our reliance upon the bedrock, Judeo-Christian principles this Country was founded upon.

Congressman Brat joins a growing list of known conservative fighters backing our campaign, including:
**Ken Cuccinelli
Senator Ted Cruz
Corey Stewart
Ginni Thomas
Congressman Louie Gohmert
Larry Pratt, Gun Owners of America
Richard Viguerie
Greene County Sheriff, Steve Smith
Prince William County Sheriff, Glen Hill
Orange County School Board Member, Chelsea Quintern
Greene County School Board Vice Chair, Todd Sansom**
**Early Voting Continues** Election “Month-and-a-half” is in full swing. Every jurisdiction in the Seventh has early voting locations open now Monday-Friday.**[Please click here to find your location today](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bMJOkFKBOeveRe0Tmc15pCOva9jOvjwRO68pdhbCOKYFpfzVEXXW1lTbWx0y3AMLu6C4Eq6qsQT5UzkYsFKK6-TGOkIfGNZK_sMnHwtDV_XugbnCIDJsXurLZPxKG3rVNtLq1KIc1n0mVI0g_LGFweorWoQwcTVA8fGRwhA7mcvJR0GWYj6EkpKGFCuqrkIOAGp8xHiFwddNcu_yJoCUtoIB_KpzsVsguiHTCjcF3wHW4mufnCEEi7-ZZyv6QGvWXQ%3D%3D)!** **Downtown Abby** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrakM1ju3VAfLVdXSkmJlpDARoa0oFTvZCYWMvFA7jEwvA2HrHQJZ1KY4nMCSZEA82A8MDuyXt31Ki_xf05oFsPFU6pe6avgY1kJHKyHlzBDjz4YUXkwocm6wy-61KilThNgsGiKWp4XplFFxziai_aCltG3PrU59rMTRD64LICReN0k8Lng9pi3jxz4s12JlvJwkYK2NybJT50S5Z4aG84y) As we all know, the Abigail Spanberger who comes around every two years trying to convince voters she’s a “Moderate” **_is very different_** than the one who goes to Washington and votes further to the Left of AOC **[and with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bIlvrLXC33OMUXD8soGFufgEjWBNLBO8FfznSriY-1GUxyJqvrcCJFlBCZRMmHiwk71z9TCVrTuyjiREQV_S970-d7I_jYHi5iYAosLoJZvdMQvJk_26S7GNOKsgCARoj75JtPEhixUkTc7e5Mt0YEr2UaSbx3WpO_unmKiDo4RH-CZGypNd3qe1m6Y6hqecia4466jlIkWaxKQsfjiFx4AfCwk0iorMiYn4OElTPkQabEX-ckC8AWRVq-CuK_x-bM2x5DCJSrsbryWbXr6BQBRwwHB9Fhh69nmbE0KFHtfZypwF0YfX-pvwePgdPVnjDw%3D%3D). **

_She thinks we’re stupid._

_She thinks we won’t notice._

**From now through November 8th we’re going to highlight how much different Downtown DC Abby is from the pretend Culpeper and Fredericksburg Abby of election time.**

In January 2020, the economy was humming along with the lowest unemployment rate in American history, inflation was low, wages were rising, and our border was secure. But what was Abigail Spanberger obsessed with instead?

**The now debunked Trump “Russian Collusion” conspiracy.**

The one that has since led straight back to Hillary Clinton.

As we had just hit full employment. As news of a new pandemic out of Communist China was raging. As Nancy Pelosi was ripping up the President’s State of the Union Speech.** Liberal Abigail Spanberger was solely focused on the sham impeachment of President Trump.**

You see, not once, but twice, did Downtown Abby vote to impeach President Trump despite the obvious constitutionally required threshold for high crimes and misdemeanors that were never met.

_**Abigail Spanberger is no moderate.**_ She has proven with her actual votes to be a left-wing Democrat hack whose election year games are no longer fooling anyone in the Seventh District. We will be holding her accountable to that record every day between now and November 8th.

**District Events** **Seventh District Candidate Forum**
[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrZFIZVn5jFvePDclrfUGmIs8im03z86xtzuqwBHkBY7qrf8OzCSn7_wDECzkbK8AbuzhRDhjpOxNcHGagGPUzOuSP7B1KZzk1YO60ckg1xaySmmVfuTYFiyQZP4lYOAlFv61A-GLD_Ts2Qp0HAEWdAn8cvMt-e3XGWs_OwqmsUulRaYesZAXUWFU0sTEmm4geGXMC5mj6A1V6__0IXETydz)
Thanks to my fellow candidates who showed up to earn the vote of Seventh District voters at the Republican Party of Virginia forum last week in Fredericksburg.

We had a great discussion on several topics including what the first bill would be that we would introduce in Congress.**While I strongly considered a balanced budget amendment bill, ultimately my response was a border security bill.** The amount of crime, drugs and human trafficking that has been pouring across our southern border for the last seventeen months is simply devastating. If we can spend $40 Billion defending the borders of other nations certainly we can spend a little bit on our very own. As a law enforcement officer, keeping the citizenry safe will always be one of my very top priorities. In case you missed the link to my endorsement from the men and women of the National ICE (Immigration and Customs Enforcement) Council**[you can click here to read it](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bEedQWWE9eUepntOsRg3IWnHzoZYkpGBYkPvyc_Bp9Bjb-SjDr9V7TV5tINmbWDcZx8az9358lb8PtubgcZSDeUFAxoemVIizvwF4aFOJpKypJnxOFK73cWMvwFn6ws-1GrUommpEebdqv3QB9pAbmoJW9XH_VDm32JxVCvhH4hZVVuy1vkZWmQlAmKq0DyNs1amigTTv8H6nRYxgWXy_rNVhmXvCfr4C8uHTXQuAHh2ZlM6npDlhGJObq8u0-Gav0tPW62SQ-R7xRGNp7hnAOGvagqZ0lvWzJglme9f_qHUZr6mRgcgeSAnth4KkVdWSOQ3amtuyvR-AHOjT9wNmuwBSWkubAz0VwNQ3MCDyTLTJyP1UDS3Cw3_4aahzfEuiw%3D%3D). **As you can see, an endorsement from those on the frontlines is rare and places me in unique company with just a handful of people that have run for office, including President Trump.

**I was extremely humbled that those in attendance saw our campaign as the most formidable and best equipped to take on Abigail Spanberger.** You can see the results of the RPV Survey of those who tuned into the forum below:
[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrZ0w-yypH7bZU6WK7VOsl0lNoolY566BvjvY4UjzNVMeAyBMMdF5qeqDTfdoXDJ7G82dEdEi4WGoOjW1yIpIOwSK_gxtMHl2m9Urt7MP6wexqvxk5OJw0n4WegQn0CAZqrbdQihUZkDiUNh3wMfSpodIRfpkzI-JbfMhe1oJuf4HgKG2fUVDOo8xv7Ut1lN2haHKgbINhEKjbkBqgYYiPgm)
**Culpeper County Reagan Dinner** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrZnxGhDHlSkSVWhGMd1SJ1WQcgFj0Woe-9BJ1PjpT4RATwKlEjduuh6sfCQBNnvxZY1Xci9U6MJ0guio2qr62BhDLwI7svv9_4OAYIpgiQVIg6YOKk-7-twIc4--gcdhXLRA-3I0z5QDS3fWoj32SojkyLHqM8-PfI70jXKF1QW_YIBOSmUK6oL788LXvctJWMZWffjScmaFdhdoqEd2dOu)
On Saturday I was fortunate to attend the Tenth Annual Culpeper County Reagan Legacy Dinner at Valhalla Farm. Despite the heat, it was a wonderful evening under the tent and I even got to run into our beautiful Lt. Governor who served as the keynote speaker.

**Unite for Freedom Fest & Blessing of the Fleet** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BralFkq0CfoTCBS61G6WKu5Ic9LPJNP1N0NiWcRLMVDeWesxNaBW-hKH9EP1EJXNDyCnyXlcRj0Pj17bjnU4FV9IroL4IoXVh0OZW0jmiiO8qisQDQiBjSKgxQvvLOvybnydqRt1L-zGAhM35OLZ8b74GM0xD-CzKKd6bKNrNMgcdr-1q0cCHZ5HRd3HHUd-iRYoQ76XGXkrbyP2I3sLv4uPuB3J6gtfjwpy2gzTVw05Fw%3D%3D) Prior to the dinner we had a busy day, first in Woodbridge with the annual “Blessing of the Fleet” prayer for the boating community in their upcoming summer boating season and then down in Spotsylvania for the Unite for Freedom Fest**celebrating our law enforcement, first responders, truckers, and farmers.** Special thanks to Regina Sue for putting on a great event and for allowing me to speak!

**Our Faith Communities

Saint John Paul the Great** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0Brb34kXUWjWstONWAHylLwwLzxp46OM5ZFVVTUftkDxcWKAjOUp9QZK9eDOaYoFKaAXjeXtuZjffWzKwyr4YvI38IdyeTt0t1lqNn_yZ3mMoGJyPSF-spUREk1DnkstNG3KqHB_w000NvCXOsLs-sogwob1TxFruq-Qi5PRuo6m-jcM-Fid1HCJsdIm-b2tnannnBnQY4-Rq8K5TSw9JnyXiEolZ-zIM-Ue5IrTKFtBnRw%3D%3D) This past week I also spent some time visiting with those from some of our Seventh District faith communities. On Thursday, I received a tour of Saint John Paul the Great Catholic School in Dumfries. With the increasing and justified concern over what our children are being taught today,**school choice and the need for quality alternatives has become a moral imperative.** Whether it’s public, charter, private, or homeschool, competition and choice in education should be celebrated and encouraged as a high tide lifts all boats.**As your next member of Congress I will be a staunch defender of school choice and allowing education dollars to follow students and families - not systems.

Image Church** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrZERD9S0MAIyiqxj17YcEO5uWbMXOdZa1YlaJWyXUno_4U07dJviOvyKOV1R_oiggm_FpCSz8yqwvzpE6Z-EDjDgGNOAyfmVyVgbKcivxKDlVtqck7N1dcbdyrAkfYAUFau9u18KrBLc3P5ViXUnjtQheSNNcSlktND-bj7h_aX-6XbFnBZYE_tVPtK9_X_AtGFfr11q11-0b0wYWYqgw1vnrjowmsulLXkCP-Qsr9wYg%3D%3D) And on Sunday I visited and worshipped with the congregants of Image Church in Woodbridge. As the daughter of a Pastor I will always stand for the religious liberty our country was founded upon. The First Amendment**_guarantees_ **our Freedom OF Religion - Not Freedom from Religion, as so many on the secular, progressive left have sought to push for over the decades. Strong faith communities are the bedrock of strong local communities and I will never waver in the defense of this inalienable right. **Yard Signs and Volunteer Opportunities!** [](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=6a5511be48be4e94b61e9f283f207be0&_e=Nmt3gyAfso62iTIrzaq3bAvrtCqwoo-zy-nvnAsazgtOph986De0DJ2KillFgFZz8dnxdkPTSk_RF7kY9GDJzs56jbP4CbqCfRmDHm96RC2SwlQ-Ja4mren5vWdvH6aNSDy2BD3_Rg-qOITPc5K48CnPqMxzq2PjLvRhiI4SAa_NDcA7VKBf7yCFm1J2fhnhoh4zY2FQ0Dl4TUMfcuvQXP1eVt0wp5tj1ZqOXB4Ci5YmxuM4o5HXU4pvzg0CACx86ZXgo-7b3TY-BDS7EtzfbzmTKDPERSLICWDmdnR0BrY8NhJ5HAcPQANYlWgI4O5yRNzzOG-CaKo9NG9I3evjcxEu_po9YdFoxNOOK4GvtMRtgLczsADTu48kSbDNiSU-k1RM3rAx5qJVMSVMJeMHv91h83JqTQfbnU_WbRg04l6UPuyIH4_GqwEH_dwCPyPhb89Dd67MFa-TuwEwjmCsTaCgtzE3_9yPCSIbD17NL2Qqqz8xfMUa6yB2zjO9zUb0QHk8p27RDtLvlgzm1A5Hjg%3D%3D)
**Our yard signs and 4x8’s are in! If you’d like a yard sign, 4x8, or would like to volunteer for Team Vega ahead of the June 21st primary please contact my campaign manager, Eric Paige, at [eric@yeslivega.com](mailto:eric@yeslivega.com).**

Until next week - we’ll see you on the campaign trail!

clean_body: | Our campaign is honored to announce that we’ve received the endorsement of former Seventh District Congressman and tea party hero, Congressman Dave Brat. Congressman Brat formerly represented the Seventh District and was a true leader in the fight for the limited government, constitutionally conservative principles many Republican espouse, but don’t often follow through on. “Yesli Vega is the conservative fighter we need to defeat Abigail Spanberger and take back the 7th District. Her plan and promises to stop the out-of-control spending madness and elitist globalism, secure our southern border, and to fight for the Judeo-Christian values our Country was founded upon is a breath of fresh air and exactly what's needed in Washington today. She has my full support and I urge all liberty loving conservatives to cast their vote for her on June 21st!” – Dave Brat, former Congressman, Virginia's 7th Congressional District. Like Congressman Brat, I will make the difficult choices necessary to preserve our republic and get us back to a sound fiscal and financial footing, fight to secure our border, and restore our reliance upon the bedrock, Judeo-Christian principles this Country was founded upon. Congressman Brat joins a growing list of known conservative fighters backing our campaign, including: Ken Cuccinelli Senator Ted Cruz Corey Stewart Ginni Thomas Congressman Louie Gohmert Larry Pratt, Gun Owners of America Richard Viguerie Greene County Sheriff, Steve Smith Prince William County Sheriff, Glen Hill Orange County School Board Member, Chelsea Quintern Greene County School Board Vice Chair, Todd Sansom Early Voting Continues Election “Month-and-a-half” is in full swing. Every jurisdiction in the Seventh has early voting locations open now Monday-Friday.! Downtown Abby As we all know, the Abigail Spanberger who comes around every two years trying to convince voters she’s a “Moderate” is very different than the one who goes to Washington and votes further to the Left of AOC . She thinks we’re stupid. She thinks we won’t notice. From now through November 8th we’re going to highlight how much different Downtown DC Abby is from the pretend Culpeper and Fredericksburg Abby of election time. In January 2020, the economy was humming along with the lowest unemployment rate in American history, inflation was low, wages were rising, and our border was secure. But what was Abigail Spanberger obsessed with instead? The now debunked Trump “Russian Collusion” conspiracy. The one that has since led straight back to Hillary Clinton. As we had just hit full employment. As news of a new pandemic out of Communist China was raging. As Nancy Pelosi was ripping up the President’s State of the Union Speech. Liberal Abigail Spanberger was solely focused on the sham impeachment of President Trump. You see, not once, but twice, did Downtown Abby vote to impeach President Trump despite the obvious constitutionally required threshold for high crimes and misdemeanors that were never met. Abigail Spanberger is no moderate. She has proven with her actual votes to be a left-wing Democrat hack whose election year games are no longer fooling anyone in the Seventh District. We will be holding her accountable to that record every day between now and November 8th. District Events Seventh District Candidate Forum Thanks to my fellow candidates who showed up to earn the vote of Seventh District voters at the Republican Party of Virginia forum last week in Fredericksburg. We had a great discussion on several topics including what the first bill would be that we would introduce in Congress.While I strongly considered a balanced budget amendment bill, ultimately my response was a border security bill. The amount of crime, drugs and human trafficking that has been pouring across our southern border for the last seventeen months is simply devastating. If we can spend $40 Billion defending the borders of other nations certainly we can spend a little bit on our very own. As a law enforcement officer, keeping the citizenry safe will always be one of my very top priorities. In case you missed the link to my endorsement from the men and women of the National ICE (Immigration and Customs Enforcement) Council. As you can see, an endorsement from those on the frontlines is rare and places me in unique company with just a handful of people that have run for office, including President Trump. I was extremely humbled that those in attendance saw our campaign as the most formidable and best equipped to take on Abigail Spanberger. You can see the results of the RPV Survey of those who tuned into the forum below: Culpeper County Reagan Dinner On Saturday I was fortunate to attend the Tenth Annual Culpeper County Reagan Legacy Dinner at Valhalla Farm. Despite the heat, it was a wonderful evening under the tent and I even got to run into our beautiful Lt. Governor who served as the keynote speaker. Unite for Freedom Fest & Blessing of the Fleet Prior to the dinner we had a busy day, first in Woodbridge with the annual “Blessing of the Fleet” prayer for the boating community in their upcoming summer boating season and then down in Spotsylvania for the Unite for Freedom Festcelebrating our law enforcement, first responders, truckers, and farmers. Special thanks to Regina Sue for putting on a great event and for allowing me to speak! Our Faith Communities Saint John Paul the Great This past week I also spent some time visiting with those from some of our Seventh District faith communities. On Thursday, I received a tour of Saint John Paul the Great Catholic School in Dumfries. With the increasing and justified concern over what our children are being taught today,school choice and the need for quality alternatives has become a moral imperative. Whether it’s public, charter, private, or homeschool, competition and choice in education should be celebrated and encouraged as a high tide lifts all boats.As your next member of Congress I will be a staunch defender of school choice and allowing education dollars to follow students and families - not systems. Image Church And on Sunday I visited and worshipped with the congregants of Image Church in Woodbridge. As the daughter of a Pastor I will always stand for the religious liberty our country was founded upon. The First Amendmentguarantees our Freedom OF Religion - Not Freedom from Religion, as so many on the secular, progressive left have sought to push for over the decades. Strong faith communities are the bedrock of strong local communities and I will never waver in the defense of this inalienable right. Yard Signs and Volunteer Opportunities! Our yard signs and 4x8’s are in! If you’d like a yard sign, 4x8, or would like to volunteer for Team Vega ahead of the June 21st primary please contact my campaign manager, Eric Paige, at mailto:eric@yeslivega.com. Until next week - we’ll see you on the campaign trail! | God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Friends,

**I recently won my primary election, and I couldn’t be more thankful.**

clean_body: Don't sit this one out | Friends, I recently won my primary election, and I couldn’t be more thankful. It’s clear: the voters of North Carolina are fed up with the failed woke and broke Biden agenda. Under Biden’s “leadership” (weak as it is), we have a crumbling economy, skyrocketing inflation, wide-open borders, and an America-Last foreign policy. Our fight is only beginning. Now that we’ve won our Primary, we’re up against the most radical candidate that North Carolina has ever seen. We’ve got our very own AOC of North Carolina, and it’s up to us to stop her. If we’re going to win in November, flip the Senate RED, and crush the Liberal Agenda, we need all patriots on board. You can’t sit out this one. Donate now: | | ---|--- | | | In Liberty, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. subject: Get out and vote TOMORROW!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Team,

The primary election in Georgia is tomorrow, Tuesday, May 24!

Please _**get out and vote for Trump-endorsed David Perdue**_ to eliminate the state income tax, crush crime, stop the indoctrination of our kids, and actually prosecute voter fraud.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=29fa2e0b15&e=89fb4d5220) to find your polling location. The polls are open from 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM.

---
| [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=3365c17bd5&e=89fb4d5220 "FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION")
---
| With your help, we will WIN. _**Please call and text your friends and family and make sure they vote!**_

David will join Sean Hannity on Fox News tonight to talk about why this race is so important. We hope you'll tune in at 9:30 PM to watch.

Thank you for your support!

– Team Perdue
