name: Flip CA-23 (Marshall for Congress)
subject: Tell Fox: Stop promoting “white replacement theory”
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Sign the petition: Demand that Fox News stop promoting "white replacement theory" [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-that-fox-news-stop-promoting-white-replacement-theory?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220509_01]
For years, Tucker Carlson and other right-wing media hosts have promoted “replacement theory”: a dangerous lie insisting that elites are trying to replace white Americans with immigrants of color.
Now, hate crimes are rising across the nation. And recent surveys show that one in three Americans believe in some tenets of replacement theory.
We believe a diverse America is a strong America. That’s why we need to fight back against these lies.
Sign the petition: Demand that Fox News stop promoting 'white replacement theory' [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-that-fox-news-stop-promoting-white-replacement-theory?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220509_01]
Seeking justice means seeking a fairer, freer, safer world in which everyone enjoys the same liberties; where we recognize that none of us are truly free until all of us are free.
It means fighting back against right-wing extremists that want to divide us along racial lines, and inspire violence against communities of color.
We must speak out against the threat of racist “replacement theory” conspiracies. Will you join the fight?
Peter , add your name here: demand that Fox News stop promoting “white replacement theory.” [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-that-fox-news-stop-promoting-white-replacement-theory?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220509_01]
Thanks for making your voice heard.
– Marshall for Congress
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220506_01]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/svitmg2ehEiMqXTE76Ppxg2?unsubscribedata=wob1G0y%2Bb1iZtj0GHfqcB%2FxuLHttrQmHeYLYoT2Ij%2FdP4YQAg%2Fsjaofu1yRVenkzIQzahc%2FeYVmzS%2Bn2xafZbeIIWcGn1A%2BgJfJVqFlxCnT1p%2Blj9RXLc8GL63mt%2Fd6dfU2xRSuTEB%2Fhbz7VgEmGIArQuSuyHYdxmMD7GT2cmEpzxrm9pyOqyAbmucyq9c8Y9lZCXsW%2Bw4TCOPOwZlQjH487MB2%2F2remOSvPU4AdiVsi5mZUEbd6EUFj4IQ3z2rzMv0OCbQ%2BGk2wGtch7f0K8yjYRUUZcVwPZRHUv8vonlAxRgLT1tiKqUltRCwEoW0JKr104nVUQOa9cj73eQMsJz9TBljcUR0%2FdgzxapiI%2Buh3dUzQHUJReNmDDCZiJqW0r%2BMMGxQ5aFlGkUcbTRhE8aeLQKlga7J3p0ujajjz9r3drtWtE43yKNFNlmt88Jlr .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=20Strahan?=
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
Win or lose, we're fighting the good fight to SAVE AMERICA! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5f86a600574f/thank-you?e=daf3f68050)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

Election Day is tomorrow – the moment of truth after more than eight months of hard work to win this all-important Republican primary and restore our voice in Washington.

I wanted to reach out personally to let you know just how honored and humbled I am.

**_I’m grateful beyond words for your support and encouragement in this race!_**
---
|
---
| | Together, we’ve shown folks here in GA-14 that there is a strong conservative alternative to MTG’s brand of self-serving political theater. We’ve exposed how she has abused her position of power in pursuit of fringe-right “celebrity” status.

Our families and communities deserve so much better.

I’m ready to lead the charge for our conservative values and priorities in Congress should we prevail tomorrow.

And I know that win or lose, we’re fighting the good fight to SAVE AMERICA!

If you have not voted yet, please make sure to cast your ballot tomorrow and encourage your family members, friends, and neighbors to vote for me too.

Thank you, again, for your prayers, encouragement, and support.

\- Jennifer
---

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: FWD - Peter, can you be a founding donor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
🚨Peter, did you hear?🚨
Over the weekend, Pramila announced that she's officially running for re-election to Washington's 7th Congressional District. We didn't want you to miss her inspiring message from yesterday, so if you haven't had a chance to read it, keep scrolling to see her message — **but before you do:**
We're hoping to raise 77 more individual contributions by midnight TONIGHT to kick off her re-election campaign and show the strong support behind our progressive movement. [**We only have a few hours left until the day's through, so if you are able, please become a founding donor of Pramila's campaign for re-election with a $3 contribution today!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13889?refcode=em20220523-1289&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13889?refcode=em20220523-1289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)**
Thanks as always for your strong support.
In solidarity,
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Sun, May 22, 2022
Subject: Peter, can you be a founding donor?
Peter,
I am so excited to announce my re-election campaign for Washington’s 7th Congressional District.
This campaign is not only about ensuring that I’m re-elected so I can keep fighting to deliver for the people, this campaign is also about working hard to keep our Democratic majority and elect more people-first progressives to join me in the House.
My campaign relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and not a cent in corporate PAC money. So, whether you’ve given in the past or haven’t donated yet, I am asking:
[**Can you help me kick off our 2022 campaign with a groundswell of support by becoming a founding donor of my re-election campaign? $3 will help us do the work of holding our House majority and lifting up progressive candidates.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13889?refcode=em20220523-1289&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)
**[Become a founding donor »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13889?refcode=em20220523-1289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)**
When I’m talking to voters in our district or out campaigning for one of the progressives I’ve endorsed in their 2022 races, I am always thinking about how we can deliver for the people.
That means policies like Medicare for All, the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, bold action on climate change, and canceling student debt. It also means pushing our majority to take important steps towards these goals — by lowering health care costs for working families, protecting workers, securing strong environmental regulations, and more.
The only way we can achieve these things in 2023 and beyond is if we hold our Democratic majority and grow our Congressional Progressive Caucus.
**I know you're with me in this work, Peter, and it would mean so much to me and my team if you stepped up today to donate $3 as we launch our re-election campaign.**
[**Become a founding donor for our 2022 re-election campaign and help us build towards our bold progressive vision for this country.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13889?refcode=em20220523-1289&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)
Thank you for being by my side.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220523-1289-footer&t=24&refcode2=1289_420207_sCr8GT&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1289%2E420207%2EsCr8GT)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: You Did It - For Now
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You did it! At least for now... I've heard from so many people who made the phone calls, texts and emails to their legislator to STOP them from spending OUR surplus money. Thank you so much. But here's the deal, the big spending Republicans and Democrats are still trying to come back for a Special Session to sell out on us and spend our surplus money. **This is unbelievable! Republicans have the ultimate bargaining position. They don't have to spend a dime of our money; instead, they can let voters decide this fall if the Legislature should Give It All Back!** But RINO Majority Leader Jeremy Miller is meeting behind closed doors with awful Governor Tim Walz to hash out the final details of a "deal." We can't let these guys spend OUR surplus money! It's about $4,000 per taxpayer - they owe you and me A LOT of money. I don't know about you, but my family could sure use that money right now. When the government overtaxes us, they should be returning the money immediately - not spending it on more wasteful government projects. **As you know, Action 4 Liberty doesn't sit on the couch and just complain about things - we activate people to take back our rights...and our money.** If legislators think they can sneak by us and spend your surplus money, they are sadly mistaken. We will make phone calls and door knock the voters in their district and let them know that their legislators prioritized growing government over giving back their money.
## Voters will be Irate!
At Action 4 Liberty, we mean business. Politicians care about one thing - re-election. So we know where to hit them where it hurts the most: telling voters the TRUTH about their legislator. **But I can't do this without your help. I need the money to pay our door knockers, phone callers and print our literature. Can I count on you for a donation immediately?** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=2 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=2)
---
Our dooknocking and phone calling campaigns work. In 2021, we pressured vulnerable Democrats in Minnesota and finally Ended Walz' Emergency Powers.
Now three of those Democrats are not running for re-election after lying to their voters. We were the ones to EXPOSE them!
We know how to make an impact in politics, which is why the Political Class hates us so much. But we don't care. If telling the TRUTH gets us enemies, we're willing to shoulder that responsibility.
In the end of the day, your rights and your money is far more important to us than cozying up to the Political Class.
Let us fight on your behalf!!!
[**But we must have the money to get our message out. Please consider making a donation of $25, $50, $100 or more NOW to help us pressure legislators to GIVE IT BACK!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=3)
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=4)
---
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_did_it_for_now&n=7), software for leaders.

But I can't do this without your help. I need the money to pay our door knockers, phone callers and print our literature. Can I count on you for a donation immediately? | "DONATE NOW!" Our dooknocking and phone calling campaigns work. In 2021, we pressured vulnerable Democrats in Minnesota and finally Ended Walz' Emergency Powers. Now three of those Democrats are not running for re-election after lying to their voters. We were the ones to EXPOSE them! We know how to make an impact in politics, which is why the Political Class hates us so much. But we don't care. If telling the TRUTH gets us enemies, we're willing to shoulder that responsibility. In the end of the day, your rights and your money is far more important to us than cozying up to the Political Class. Let us fight on your behalf!!! Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty "Support Us" Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

You don’t have to climb a mountain to experience the woes of elevation. Plenty of favorite travel spots perch on high, such as Cusco, Peru, at 11,152 feet, and Leh, India, at 11,550 feet. At altitude, there’s less oxygen in the air, which can leave you gasping for breath just trying to walk up a street. (Discover nine mountains to summit in a lifetime.) What exactly is happening to the body? “First it increases breathing, which can feel like a shortness of breath,” says Peter Hackett, director of the Institute for Altitude Medicine in Colorado. “Second the blood vessels in the brain expand, so that there’s more blood and therefore more oxygen. That gives the sensation of a headache.” Symptoms of acute mountain sickness, or AMS as it’s known, include trouble sleeping, nausea, loss of appetite, and fatigue. If you keep going higher and ignore signals from your body, you could develop HAPE, high altitude pulmonary edema, or HACE, high altitude cerebral edema, both of which are very serious. All that said, some of the best views on Earth are seen from up high. The key to your success? Go up slowly. | | | UPDATE via FiveThirtyEight: **Trump's disapproval rating nears an all-time high!**

_As Trump considers another run for office, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_**

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220523-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220523-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=4350%2E9716520%2EH4Qh1y)
Team -- Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that a recent poll shows Donald Trump’s **disapproval** rating at 67% -- **_that's near an ALL-TIME HIGH!_**

The lies and scandals of Trump’s four years in office are FINALLY starting to catch up with him! And with Trump still calling the shots in GOP races nationwide, these numbers could spell **_serious_** trouble for Republicans this year.

**We need your help to confirm this poll's accuracy BEFORE Trump launches another White House bid.** We’re missing 6 responses from Pennsylvania, and our live poll expires at 11:59 PM. **Can you take a moment to respond?**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220523-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220523-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=4350%2E9716520%2EH4Qh1y)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

body:
A quick message from Joe before polls open tomorrow morning. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13657186?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f7c149bd5f&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , I'm writing to you on this Election Day eve with a final message before voting begins tomorrow morning.

You already know how important the 2022 election is. **The GOP have revealed themselves to be cruel and unflinching in their attacks on Texans.** They will stop at nothing to strip away reproductive rights. They will stop at nothing to strip away voting rights. What's next?

**We NEED someone in the office of Texas Attorney General that has the experience to stand up to them and end this cycle of cruel and corrupt policymaking. **

After 22 months of campaigning across our state and engaging with Texas voters, the Jaworski for Texas Attorney General primary campaign rests its case — **tomorrow, Texas Democrats decide. ** If you’ve voted already, thank you. If you’re voting tomorrow, **I respectfully ask for your vote because I can beat Ken Paxton in November. ** Integrity is a public service value we’ve lost under the current Texas Attorney General, but we most certainly can reclaim it. Your vote in this consequential runoff is an important step in that journey.

Please stand with me tomorrow and cast your vote. [**Click here to find your polling location.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=475cafca2c&e=5d8d80652b)

Onward!
